source: "We now have 4-month-old mice that are non-diabetic that used to be diabetic," he added.
reference: "Nau mipela i gat wanpela rat we i no gat sik suga moa na em i gat 4-pela mun," dispela man i tok.

source: Dr. Ehud Ur, professor of medicine at Dalhousie University in Halifax, Nova Scotia and chair of the clinical and scientific division of the Canadian Diabetes Association cautioned that the research is still in its early days.
reference: Dr. Ehud Ur, em i wanpela profesa bilong marasin long Dalhousie University long Halifax, long Nova Scotia na em i siaman sains na klinik seksen bilong Canadian Diabetes Association i givim tok lukaut olsem dispela risets i nupela yet.

source: Like some other experts, he is skeptical about whether diabetes can be cured, noting that these findings have no relevance to people who already have Type 1 diabetes.
reference: Wankain olsem ol narapela saveman, em i gat tupela tingting sapos ol i ken oraitim sik suga, em i tok olsem ol dispela samting we ol i painimaut long en, em i no bilong ol manmeri husat i gat Type 1 bilong sik suga.

source: On Monday, Sara Danius, permanent secretary of the Nobel Committee for Literature at the Swedish Academy, publicly announced during a radio program on Sveriges Radio in Sweden the committee, unable to reach Bob Dylan directly about winning the 2016 Nobel Prize in Literature, had abandoned its efforts to reach him.
reference: Long Mande, nambawan sekreteri bilong Nobel Commitee for Literature long Swedish Academy, i tokaut long pablik long redio progrem bilong Sveriges Radio long Sweden olsem, ol i bin no inap long toktok wantaim Bob Dylan long 2016 Nobel Prize in Literature we em bin winim, na ol i no wok long traim long toktok wantaim em.

source: Danius said, "Right now we are doing nothing. I have called and sent emails to his closest collaborator and received very friendly replies. For now, that is certainly enough."
reference: Danius i tok, "Nau yet, mipela i no wok long mekim wanpela samting. Mi bin ring na salim ol i-meil long man i save wok wantaim em na mi bin kisim ol gutpela bekim na dispela em i inap."

source: Previously, Ring's CEO, Jamie Siminoff, remarked the company started when his doorbell wasn't audible from his shop in his garage.
reference: Bipo, CEO bilong Ring, Jamie Siminoff, i tok olsem dispela kampani i stat taim em i no inap long harim belo bilong dua bilong haus bilong em taim em i stap long stua bilong em we i stap long ples bilong em long putim kar.

source: He built a WiFi door bell, he said.
reference: Em i wokim wanpela WiFi belo bilong dua, em i tok.

source: Siminoff said sales boosted after his 2013 appearance in a Shark Tank episode where the show panel declined funding the startup.
reference: Siminoff i tok olsem namba bilong ol samting we em i wok long salim i go antap taim emi kamap long wanpela episod bilong Shark Tank progrem we ol lain i stap insait long dispela progrem i no laik long givim em sampela mani bilong helpim bisnis bilong em.

source: In late 2017, Siminoff appeared on shopping television channel QVC.
reference: Klostu long pinis bilong yia 2017, Siminoff i kamap long QVC, wanpela televisen 'channel' bilong salim samting,

source: Ring also settled a lawsuit with competing security company, the ADT Corporation.
reference: Na tu, Ring i bin givim mani long wanpela sekuriti kampani, ADT Corporation, we i bin laik kisim em i go long kot.

source: While one experimental vaccine appears able to reduce Ebola mortality, up until now, no drugs have been clearly demonstrated suitable for treating existing infection.
reference: Wanpela marasin we ol i wok long testim, em i daunim namba bilong ol manmeri i wok long dai long Ebola. Long dispela taim i kam inap nau, i no gat marasin i soim ples klia olsem em i inap long oraitim dispela sik.

source: One antibody cocktail, ZMapp, initially showed promise in the field, but formal studies indicated it had less benefit than sought in preventing death.
reference: Wanpela tritmen we i yusim ol 'antibody', nem bilong em ZMapp, i bin soim olsem em i ken oraitim sik, tasol bihain long ol stadi i kamap, ol i painimaut olsem em i no inap long banisim ol manmeri long i dai long rot we ol i bin tingim long en.

source: In the PALM trial, ZMapp served as a control, meaning scientists used it as a baseline and compared the three other treatments to it.
reference: Taim ol i bin mekim wanpela test we ol i kolim PALM, ZMapp i stap olsem wanpela 'control', dispela em i min olsem ol saintis i yusim em olsem wanpela 'baseline' na i skelim wanem we ol narapela tritmen i wok bihainim em.

source: USA Gymnastics supports the United States Olympic Committee's letter and accepts the absolute need of the Olympic family to promote a safe environment for all of our athletes.
reference: USA Gymnastics i sapotim leta bilong United States Olympic Commitee na em i save olsem dispela em i wanpela bikpela samting tru long Olymlpic famili long kamapim wanpela seif envairomen bilong olgeta 'athletes'.

source: We agree with the USOC's statement that the interests of our athletes and clubs, and their sport, may be better served by moving forward with meaningful change within our organization, rather than decertification.
reference: Mipela i wanbel wantaim tok save bilong USOC we i tok olsem gutpela bilong ol 'athlete' na ol 'club', na ol gem bilong ol, na dispela i ken kamap taim mipela i gohet long mekim ol wok bilong mipela na mekim ol gutpela senis i kamap insait long oganaisesen, na i no rausim setifiket.

source: USA Gymnastics supports an independent investigation that may shine light on how abuse of the proportion described so courageously by the survivors of Larry Nassar could have gone undetected for so long and embraces any necessary and appropriate changes.
reference: USA Gymnastics i sapotim wanpela investigesen we i ken painimaut long wanem we pasin bilong bagarapim narapela man o meri i kamap long dispela kain mak long longpela taim na nau ol lain i bin kisim dispela kain hevi long Larry Nassar i tokaut long en na ol bai mekim ol senis we i gutpela na i stretpela.

source: USA Gymnastics and the USOC have the same goal — making the sport of gymnastics, and others, as safe as possible for athletes to follow their dreams in a safe, positive and empowered environment.
reference: USA Gymnastics na USOC i gat wankain as tingting — mekim geim bilong 'gymnastics', na ol narapela, i kamap seif olgeta bai ol 'athletes' i ken bihainim ol driman bilong ol long wanpela seif, positif na gutpela envairomen we i mekim ol i pilim olsem ol i inap long mekim samting.

source: Throughout 1960s, Brzezinski worked for John F. Kennedy as his advisor and then the Lyndon B. Johnson administration.
reference: Insait long 1960, Brezezinski i wok olsem wanpela edvaisa bilong John F. Kennedy na bihain em i wok long Lyndon B. Johnson edministresen.

source: During the 1976 selections he advised Carter on foreign policy, then served as National Security Advisor (NSA) from 1977 to 1981, succeeding Henry Kissinger.
reference: Long 1976, em i givim edvais long Carter long 'foreign policy', na bihain em i kisim ples bilong Henry Kissinger na wok olsem National Security Advisor (NSA) long yia 1977 i go long 1981.

source: As NSA, he assisted Carter in diplomatically handling world affairs, such as the Camp David Accords, 1978; normalizing US–China relations thought the late 1970s; the Iranian Revolution, which led to the Iran hostage crisis, 1979; and the Soviet invasion in Afghanistan, 1979.
reference: Taim em i wok olsem NSA, em i helpim Carter long mekim ol gutpela disisen long ol 'world affairs', kain olsem Camp David Accords, long 1978; na mekim rilesensip namel long US–China i kamap gut long 1970; Iranian Revolution, we i bin kamapim 'Iran hostage crises', long 1979; na taim Soviet i go insait long kantri Afghanistan, long 1979.

source: The movie, featuring Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, received nominations in all major categories.
reference: Dispela muvi we Ryan Gosling na Emma Stone i stap insait long en, em ol lain i makim em long i stap insait long olgeta bikpela 'category'.

source: Gosling and Stone received nominations for Best Actor and Actress respectively.
reference: Ol i makim Gosling na Stone long 'category' bilong Best Actor na Best Actress.

source: The other nominations include Best Picture, Director, Cinematography, Costume Design, Film-editing, Original Score, Production Design, Sound Editing, Sound Mixing and Original Screenplay.
reference: Ol i makim ol long 'category' bilong Best Picture, Director, Cinematography, Costume Design, Film-editing, Original Score, Production Design, Sound Editing, Sound Mixing na Original Screenplay.

source: Two songs from the movie, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) and City of Stars, received nominations for best original song. Lionsgate studio received 26 nominations — more than any other studio.
reference: Tupelal singsing bilong dispela muvi, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) na City of Stars, em ol i makim olsem 'best original song'. Ol i makim Lionsgate studio 26-pela taim—dispela em i moa long olgeta narapela 'studio'.

source: Late on Sunday, the United States President Donald Trump, in a statement delivered via the press secretary, announced US troops would be leaving Syria.
reference: Long Sande, Presiden bilong United States Donald Trump, i tok insait long wanpela leta we press secretary bilong em i ritim, em i tok olsem ol soldia bilong US bai i lusim kantri Syria.

source: The announcement was made after Trump had a phone conversation with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.
reference: Dispela tok save i bin kamap bihain long Trump i toktok long telefon wantaim Presiden bilong kantri Turkey Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.

source: Turkey would also take over guarding captured ISIS fighters which, the statement said, European nations have refused to repatriate.
reference: Na tu, dispela leta i tok olsem Turkey bai i mekim wok bilong was long ol soldia bilong ISIS we ol kantri bilong Europe i no laik long salim i go bek long kantri bilong ol.

source: This not only confirms that at least some dinosaurs had feathers, a theory already widespread, but provides details fossils generally cannot, such as color and three-dimensional arrangement.
reference: Dispela em i soim olsem tru tru sampela bilong ol dinaso i gat gras bilong pisin, wanpela tingting we planti lain i gat, tasol dispela i givim ol infomesen we ol fosil i no inap long givim, kain olsem kala na 'three dimensional arrangement'.

source: . Scientists say this animal's plumage was chestnut-brown on top with a pale or carotenoid-colored underside.
reference: . Ol saintis i tok olsem kala bilong gras bilong dispela animas em i 'chestnut-brown' long antap wantaim wanpela 'pale' o 'carotenoid-colored' long aninit sait.

source: The find also grants insight into the evolution of feathers in birds.
reference: Dispela wok painimaut i givim sampela tingting tu long wanem we gras bilong pisin i save kamap.

source: Because the dinosaur feathers do not have a well-developed shaft, called a rachis, but do have other features of feathers — barbs and barbules — the researchers inferred the rachis was likely a later evolutionary development that these other features.
reference: Bikos ol gras bilong pisin we i stap long ol dainaso i no gat 'well-developed shaft', we ol i save kolim 'rachis', tasol em i gat tupela narapela samting long ol gras bilong pisin— 'barbs' na 'barbules' — ol lain i go pas long dispela wok painimaut i skelim olsem dispela 'rachis' em i kamap bihain long divelopmen bilong ol dispela gras bilong ol pisin we i stap long ol dainaso.

source: The feathers' structure suggests that they were not used in flight but rather for temperature regulation or display. The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.
reference: Straksa bilong ol dispela gras bilong pisin i soim olsem wok bilong ol em i no bilong flai tasol em i bilong mekim tempritsa (temperature) bilong bodi bilong ol i stap gut na bilong soim kala bilong ol long ol narapela. Ol lain i go pas long dispela wok painimaut i ting olsem, maski dispela em i tel bilong wanpela yangpela dainaso, dispela 'sample' i soim gras bilong wanpela bikpela dainaso na i no gras bilong wanpela pikinini dainaso.

source: The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.
reference: Ol lain i go pas long dispela wok painimaut i ting olsem, maski dispela em i tel bilong wanpela yangpela dainaso, dispela i soim olsem gras bilong pisin i stap long ol bikpela dainaso i no planti olsem gras bilong pikinini dainaso.

source: A car bomb detonated at police headquarters in Gaziantep, Turkey yesterday morning killed two police officers and injured more than twenty other people.
reference: Wanpela bom i stap long kar na i pairap long bikpela ofis bilong ol polis long Gaziantep, long Turkey aste moning na i kilim tupela polis ofisa na kamapim bagarap long bodi bilong moa long twentipela narapela manmeri.

source: The governor's office said nineteen of the injured were police officers.
reference: Ofis bilong gavana i tok olsem naintinpela bilong ol dispela manmeri we bagarap i kamap long bodi bilong ol, em ol polis ofisa.

source: Police said they suspect an alleged Daesh (ISIL) militant of responsibility for the attack.
reference: Polis i tok ol i saspek olsem wanpela soldia bilong Daesh (ISIL) i kamapim dispela hevi.

source: They found the Sun operated on the same basic principles as other stars: The activity of all stars in the system was found to be driven by their luminosity, their rotation, and nothing else.
reference: Ol i painimaut olsem Sun i save ol wankain bikpela tingting olsem ol narapela sta: Dispela ektiviti bilong olgeta sta long sistem em ol i painimaut olsem 'luminosity' na 'rotation' bilong ol i save mekim ol i tanim tanim, na i no gat narapela samting gen.

source: The luminosity and rotation are used together to determine a star's Rossby number, which is related to plasma flow.
reference: Dispela 'luminosity' na 'rotation' em ol i save yusim wantaim long painimaut Rossby namba bilong wanpela sta, na dispela em i gat rilesensip wantaim 'plasma flow'.

source: The smaller the Rossby number, the less active the star with respect to magnetic reversals.
reference: Sapos Rossby namba i liklik, 'magnetic reversal' bilong dispela sta bai i no ektif (active) tumas.

source: During his trip, Iwasaki ran into trouble on many occasions.
reference: Long dispela raun bilong em, Iwasaki i painim trabel planti taim.

source: He was robbed by pirates, attacked in Tibet by a rabid dog, escaped marriage in Nepal and was arrested in India.
reference: Ol 'pirate' i bin holimpasim em na kisim ol samting bilong em, wanpela sik dok i bin kaikaim em long Tibet, em i bin ranawe long marit long Nepal na ol i arestim (arrest) em long India.

source: The 802.11n standard operates on both the 2.4Ghz and 5.0Ghz frequencies.
reference: 802.11n stendet mak i operet long tupela 'frequency' wantaim, 2.4Ghz na 5.0Ghz.

source: This will allow it to be backwards compatible with 802.11a, 802.11b and 802.11g, provided that the base station has dual radios.
reference: Dispela i mekim em i ken wok 'backwards' wantaim 802.11a, 802.11g, dispela i ken kamap sapos dispela 'base station' i gat 'dual radios'.

source: The speeds of 802.11n are substantially faster than that of its predecessors with a maximum theoretical throughput of 600Mbit/s.
reference: Ol spit bilong 802.11n i spit moa long ol narapela 'frequecy' we i bin stap pastaim na 'maximum' mak bilong 'theoretical throughput' em 600Mbit/s.

source: Duvall, who is married with two adult children, did not leave a big impression on Miller, to whom the story was related.
reference: Duvall, em i marit na em i gat tupela bikpela pikinini, na em i no mekim Miller i amamas, we dispela stori i toktok long en.

source: When asked for comment, Miller said, "Mike talks a lot during the hearing...I was getting ready so I wasn't really hearing what he was saying."
reference: Taim ol i askim em long mekim sampela toktok, Miller i tok, "Mike i save toktok planti taim long taim bilong dispela kot...I wok long redi olsem na mi no harim wanem samting em wok long tok."

source: "We will endeavour to cut carbon dioxide emissions per unit of GDP by a notable margin by 2020 from the 2005 level," Hu said.
reference: "Mipela bai wok hat strong long daunim namba bilong 'carbon dioxide' we i save kamap long wanpela 'unit' bilong GDP long wanpela bikpela mak long yia 2020 long mak we em i bin i stap long en long yia 2005," Hu i tok.

source: He did not set a figure for the cuts, saying they will be made based on China's economic output.
reference: Em i no makim wanpela namba bilong mak we dispela bai i kam daun long en, na em i tok olsem ol bai mekim dispela bihainim hamas mani China i mekim.

source: Hu encouraged developing countries "to avoid the old path of polluting first and cleaning up later."
reference: Hu i strongim ol kantri we i wok long divelop yet "long abrusim pasin bilong mekim polusen (pollution) pastaim ne klinim dispela polusen bihain."

source: He added that "they should not, however, be asked to take on obligations that go beyond their development stage, responsibility and capabilities."
reference: Em i tok moa olsem "ol i mas no ken askim ol long mekim ol wok we i antap moa long mak bilong divelopmen we ol i stap long em, mak bilong wok ol inap long mekim, na mak bilong save ol i gat."

source: The Iraq Study Group presented its report at 12.00 GMT today.
reference: Dispela Iraq Study Group i givim ripot bilong em long 12:00 GMT long tude.

source: It warns No one can guarantee that any course of action in Iraq at this point will stop sectarian warfare, growing violence, or a slide toward chaos.
reference: Em i givim tok lukaut olsem, long dispela taim, No gat wanpela man i ken tok olsem wanpela kain plen bai inap long stopim ol pait i save kamap namel long ol seksen, kros na pait, na bikpela bagarap.

source: The Report opens with plea for open debate and the formation of a consensus in the United States about the policy towards the Middle East.
reference: Dispela Report i stat wantaim wanpela askim long i mas i gat 'open debate' na wanbel long wanpela tingting i kamap long polisi bilong United States i go long Middle East.

source: The Report is highly critical of almost every aspect of the present policy of the Executive towards Iraq and it urges an immediate change of direction.
reference: Dispela Report i skelim gut tru olgeta samting insait long dispela polisi bilong Executive i go long Iraq na em i tok strong olsem i mas i gat senis i kamap.

source: First among its 78 recommendations is that a new diplomatic initiative should be taken before the end of this year to secure Iraq’s borders against hostile interventions and to re-establish diplomatic relations with its neighbors.
reference: Namba wan namel long 78-pela rekomendesen (recommendation) em i olsem i mas i gat wanpela nupela 'diplomatic initiative' bipo long dispela yia i pinis long mekim ol boda bilong Iraq i stap seif long ol birua na kamapim ol gutpela rilesensip wantaim ol lain i stap klostu long em.

source: Current senator and Argentine First Lady Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner announced her presidential candidacy yesterday evening in La Plata, a city 50 kilometers (31 miles) away from Buenos Aires.
reference: Long aste avinun, long La Plata, wanpela siti we i stap 50 kilomita (31-pela 'mile') long Buenos Aires, dispela senata (senator) husat em i Argentine First Lady Cristina Fernandez de Kircher i tokaut olsem em bai i resis long kamap presiden.

source: Mrs. Kirchner announced her intention to run for president at the Argentine Theatre, the same location she used to start her 2005 campaign for the Senate as member of the Buenos Aires province delegation.
reference: Mrs. Kircher i tokaut long tingting bilong em long resis long kamap olsem presiden long Argentine Theatre, long dispela seim (same) lokesen taim em i bin yusim long statim 2005 kempein (campaign) bilong em long Senate as wanpela memba bilong Buenos Aires provins 'delegation'.

source: The debate was sparked by controversy over spending on relief and reconstruction in the wake Hurricane Katrina; which some fiscal conservatives have humorously labeled "Bush's New Orleans Deal."
reference: Dispela tok pait i bin kamap bikos long ol lain i yusim planti mani tumas long givim helpim na mekim gen ol haus na ol samting we Hurricane Katrina i bin bagarapim; sampela bilong ol lain we i save was long hamas mani we gavman i save yusim i kolim dispela olsem "Bush's New Orleans Deal."

source: Liberal criticism of the reconstruction effort has focused on the awarding of reconstruction contracts to perceived Washington insiders.
reference: Ol Liberal i tok olsem ol wok bilong bildim bek gen ol samting we i bin bagarap i bin lukluk long givim ol wok kontrak bilong konstraksen (construction) i go long ol bisnis we i gat sampela luksave lain bilong ol i stap long Washington.

source: Over four million people went to Rome to attend the funeral.
reference: Moa long foa milien manmeri i go long Rome long dispela funerel (funeral).

source: The number of people present was so large that it was not possible for everybody to gain access to the funeral in St. Peter's Square.
reference: Dispela namba bilong ol manmeri we i stap long dispela taim em i bikpela tru olsem na olgeta lain i no inap long go insait long dispela funerel we i wok long kamap insait long St. Peter's Square.

source: Several large television screens were installed in various places in Rome to let the people watch the ceremony.
reference: Planti bikpela televisen skrin (screen) em ol i bin putim long ol wanwan ples long Roma bai ol manmeri i ken lukim dispela funerel.

source: In many other cities of Italy and in the rest of the world, particularly in Poland, similar setups were made, which were viewed by a great number of people.
reference: Long planti narapela siti bilong Italy na long olgeta hap bilong graun, bikpela moa long Poland, ol i mekim ol wankain 'setup', na planti manmeri i lukim dispela funerel (funeral).

source: Historians have criticized past FBI policies for focusing resources on cases which are easy to solve, especially stolen car cases, with the intent of boosting the agency's success rate.
reference: Ol lain i save stadi long histori i tok agensim ol polisi bilong FBI we i putim ol 'risos' long ol 'case' we i isi long stretim, bikpela moa em long sait bilong ol kar we ol lain i bin stilim, long wanem ol i laik mekim mak bilong FBI long stretim ol 'case' i go antap.

source: Congress began funding the obscenity initiative in fiscal 2005 and specified that the FBI must devote 10 agents to adult pornography.
reference: Congress i stat long givim mani long 'obscenity initiative' long taim em i mekim bajet bilong em long 2005 na tok olsem FBI i mas givim 10-pela wokmanmeri bilong stretim ol 'case' bilong 'adult pornography'.

source: Robin Uthappa made the innings highest score, 70 runs in just 41 balls by hitting 11 fours and 2 sixes.
reference: Robin Uthappa i mekim nambawan sko (score) we i winim olgeta bikpela sko bilong dispela 'inning', em i mekim 70-pela 'runs' long 41-pela bal tasol taim em i paitim bal long mak bilong 11-pela foa na 2-pela siks.

source: Middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar and Rahul Dravid, performed well and made a hundred-run partnership.
reference: 'Middle order batsmen', Sachin Tendulkar na Rahul Dravid, i pilai gut na mekim 100-pela run taim tupela i pilai wantaim.

source: But, after losing the captain's wicket India only made 36 runs loosing 7 wickets to end the innings.
reference: Tasol, bihain long kepten bilong ol i lusim 'wicket' bilong em, India i mekim 36-pela 'runs' tasol na i lusim 7-pela 'wickets' long pinisim dispela 'innings'.

source: U.S. President George W. Bush arrived in Singapore the morning of November 16, beginning a week-long tour of Asia.
reference: U.S President George W. Bush i kamap long Singapore long moning bilong Novemba 16, long statim wanpela wik we em bai i raun lukim Asia.

source: He was greeted by Singapore's Deputy Prime Minister Wong Kan Seng and discussed trade and terrorism issues with the Singapore Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong.
reference: Deputy Prime Minister bilong Singapore Wong Kan Seng i tok halo long em na em i toktok wantaim Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong long 'trade' na 'terrorism'.

source: After a week of losses in the midterm election, Bush told an audience about the expansion of trade in Asia.
reference: Bihain long wanpela wik we ol lus i kamap long 'midterm election', Bush i toktok long wanpela lain manmeri na i tokim ol long 'expansion' we bai i kamap long 'trade' long Asia.

source: Prime Minister Stephen Harper has agreed to send the government's 'Clean Air Act' to an all-party committee for review, before its second reading, after Tuesday's 25 minute meeting with NDP leader Jack Layton at the PMO.
reference: Prime Minister Stephen Harper i bin wanbel long salim 'Clean Air Act' bilong gavman i go long wanpela 'all-party committee' long skelim, bipo long namba tu taim bilong ritim em, dispela bai i kamap bihain long 25-pela minit miting wantaim NDP lida Jack Layton long PMO.

source: Layton had asked for changes to the conservatives' environmental bill during the meeting with the PM, asking for a "thorough and complete rewriting" of the Conservative party's environmental bill.
reference: Taim dispela miting i kamap wantaim PM, Layton i bin askim long sampela senis long kamap long pepa lo bilong envairomen we ol 'conservatives' i kamapim, em i askim long "rait long rot we i skelim gut ol samting na i karamapim gut olgeta bikpela samting" long dispela pepa lo bilong ol Conservative pati long envairomen.

source: Ever since the Federal Government stepped in to take over funding of the Mersey hospital in Devonport, Tasmania, the state government and some federal MPs have criticised this act as a stunt in the prelude to the federal election to be called by November.
reference: Taim Federal Government i kam na i kisim ol mani bilong Mersey haus sik long Devonport, long Tasmania, gavman bilong dispela 'state' na ol sampela MP bilong gavman i tok strong olsem dispela pasim em i trik bilong redi long ileksen we bai kamap long Novemba.

source: But Prime Minister John Howard has said the act was only to safeguard the facilities of the hospital from being downgraded by the Tasmanian government, in giving an extra AUD$45 million.
reference: Tasol Prime Minister John Howard i bin tok olsem dispela pasim em i wanpela rot tasol bilong banisim ol bilding na masin bilong dispela haus sik bai gavman bilong Tasmania i no ken mekim level bilong haus sik i go daun, olsem na em i givim dispela narapela AUD$45 milien.

source: According to the latest bulletin, sea level readings indicated a tsunami was generated. There was some definite tsunami activity recorded near Pago Pago and Niue.
reference: Laspela nius bilong dispela i mekim ripot olsem, level bilong ol 'sea readings' i soim olsem wanpela tsunami i bin kamap. Tru tru i bin i gat sampela ektiviti bilong tsunami we ol i bin rekodim klostu long Pago Pago na Niue.

source: No major damage or injuries have been reported in Tonga, but power was temporarily lost, which reportedly prevented Tongan authorities from receiving the tsunami warning issued by the PTWC.
reference: Long Tonga, no gat ripot bilong bikpela bagarap i kamap long ol samting o long ol manmeri, tasol i no gat pawa bilong lait, na dispela i mekim na ol atoriti long Tonga i no bin kisim tok lukaut bilong tsunami we PTWC i bin salim.

source: Fourteen schools in Hawaii located on or near coastlines were closed all of Wednesday despite the warnings being lifted.
reference: Olgeta fotinpela skul long Hawaii we i stap long nambis o i stap klostu long nambis i bin pas long Trinde, maski ol i bin rausim dispela tok lukaut.

source: U.S. President George W. Bush welcomed the announcement.
reference: U.S President George W. Bush i welkamim dispela tok save.

source: Bush spokesman Gordon Johndroe called North Korea's pledge "a major step towards the goal of achieving the verifiable denuclearization of the Korean peninsula."
reference: Mausman bilong Bush Gordon Johndroe i tok olsem 'pledge' bilong North Korea em i "wanpela bikpela samting we i kontribut i go long as tingting bilong kisim 'verifiable denuclearization' bilong 'peninsula' bilong Korea."

source: The tenth named storm of the Atlantic Hurricane season, Subtropical Storm Jerry, formed in the Atlantic Ocean today.
reference: Dispela namba ten bikpela win na ren we ol i kolim long dispela Hurricane sisen (season) em, Subtropical Storm Jerry, na em i wok long stat long kamap long Atlantic Ocean long tude.

source: The National Hurricane Center (NHC) says that at this point Jerry poses no threat to land.
reference: National Hurricane Centre (NHC) i tok olsem long dispela taim Jerry i no stap long mak we em i inap long kamapim bagarap long graun.

source: The U.S. Corps of Engineers estimated that 6 inches of rainfall could breach the previously damaged levees.
reference: U.S Corps of Engineers i estimetim (estimate) olsem 6 'inches' bilong ren bai i bagarapim olgeta ol 'levees' we i bin bagarap pinis na i stap.

source: The Ninth Ward, which saw flooding as high as 20 feet during Hurricane Katrina, is currently in waist-high water as the nearby levee was overtopped.
reference: Ninth Ward, we tait wara i bin kamap long mak kain olsem 20 'feet' long taim bilong Hurricane Katrina, em nau yet mak bilong em i stap long lek na 'levee' we i stap klostu em wara i karamapim em.

source: Water is spilling over the levee in a section 100 feet wide.
reference: Wara i wok long kapsait i go antap long 'levee' long seksen we bikpela bilong em i 100 'feet'.

source: Commons Administrator Adam Cuerden expressed his frustration over the deletions when he spoke to Wikinews last month.
reference: Commons Administrator Adam Cuerden i tokaut long ol bel hevi bilong long ol 'deletions' taim em toktok wantaim Wikinews long mun i go pinis.

source: "He [Wales] basically lied to us from the start. First, by acting as if this was for legal reasons. Second, by pretending he was listening to us, right up to his art deletion."
reference: "Em [Wales] i giamanim mipela long stat bilong olgeta samting. Pastaim, em i ekt olsem em i wok long mekim dispela bikos em i laik bihainim lo. Bihain, em i ekt olsem em i wok long putim yau na harim mipela, i go inap long taim em i mekim 'deletion'."

source: The community irritation led to current efforts to draft a policy regarding sexual content for the site which hosts millions of openly-licensed media.
reference: Komuniti i kros na dispela i kamapim ol wok bilong mekim ol polisi we i toktok long 'sexual content' bilong dispela 'site' we i save i gat milien 'open-licensed media' i yusim.

source: The work done was mostly theoretical, but the program was written to simulate observations made of the Sagittarius galaxy.
reference: Dispela wok em ol i wokim long kamapim sampela as tingting, tasol ol i bin raitim dispela progrem long soim ol samting we ol i bin lukim long Sagittarius 'galaxy'.

source: The effect the team was looking for would be caused by tidal forces between the galaxy's dark matter and the Milky Way's dark matter.
reference: Samting we dispela tim i wok long painim em ol fos bilong tait namel long 'dark matter' bilong dispela 'galaxy' na 'dark matter' bilong Milky Way 'galaxy' i kamapim.

source: Just like the moon exerts a pull on the earth, causing tides, so does the Milky Way exert a force on the Sagittarius galaxy.
reference: Wankain olsem mun i save i gat wanpela fos we i save pulim graun i go long em, na kamapim ol tait, Milky Way tu i save i gat wanpela fos we i save pulim Sagittarius 'galaxy' i kam long em.

source: The scientists were able to conclude that the dark matter affect other dark matter in the same way regular matter does.
reference: Ol saintis i no inap long kamap long wanpela tingting olsem 'dark matter' i save ekt long narapela 'dark matter' long wankain we olsem olgeta 'matter' i save mekim.

source: This theory says that most dark matter around a galaxy is located around a galaxy in a kind of halo, and is made of lots of small particles.
reference: Dispela tingting bilong sains i tok olsem planti 'dark matter' long 'galaxy' i stap raunim 'galaxy' olsem wanpela 'halo', em i gat planti 'small particles' i stap insait long em.

source: Television reports show white smoke coming from the plant.
reference: Televisen i givim ripot we i soim waitpela smok i wok long kam long dispela diwai.

source: Local authorities are warning residents in the vicinity of the plant to stay indoors, turn off air-conditioners and not to drink tap water.
reference: Ol loken atoriti i givim tok lukaut long ol lain i stap klostu long dispela diwai long stap insait long haus tasol, putim of 'air-conditioner' na no ken dring wara long tep.

source: According to Japan's nuclear agency, radioactive caesium and iodine has been identified at the plant.
reference: Nuclear agency bilong Japan i tok olsem, ol i painimaut olsem i gat 'radioactive caesium' na 'iodine' long dispela diwai.

source: Authorities speculate that this indicates that containers holding uranium fuel at the site may have ruptured and are leaking.
reference: Ol atoriti i ting olsem dispela i soim olsem ol dispela kontena we i holim 'uranium' long dispela senta i mas bruk na i wok long lik (leak).

source: Dr. Tony Moll discovered the Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) in the South African region KwaZulu-Natal.
reference: Dr. Tony Moll i painimaut long dispela Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) long KwaZulu-Natal rijen bilong South Africa.

source: In an interview, he said the new variant was "very highly troubling and alarming because of the very high fatality rate."
reference: Long wanpela intaviu, em i tok olsem dispela nupela 'variant' i bin "kamapim bikpela hevi na pret bikos long planti manmeri i dai."

source: Some patients might have contracted the bug in the hospital, Dr. Moll thinks, and at least two were hospital health workers.
reference: I luk olsem sampela bilong ol sikmanmeri i bin kisim dispela binatang long haus sik, Dr, Moll i ting olsem, na tupela bilong ol lain em ol wokmanmeri bilong haus sik.

source: In one year's time, an infected person may infect 10 to 15 close contacts.
reference: Insait long wanpela yia, wanpela man o meri we i sik wantaim dispela binatang i ken givim dispela sik i go long 10 o 15-pela lain we i save stap klostu long ol.

source: However, the percentage of XDR-TB in the entire group of people with tuberculosis still seems to be low; 6,000 of the total 330,000 people infected at any particular moment in South Africa.
reference: Tasol, pesentes (percentage) bilong XDR-TB insait long wanpela grup manmeri wantaim sik 'tuberculosis' i stap daunbilo' 60,00 bilong 330,00 manmeri i save kisim dispela sik long wanpela taim insait long South Africa.

source: The satellites, both of which weighed in excess of 1,000 pounds, and traveling at approximately 17,500 miles per hour, collided 491 miles above the Earth.
reference: Dispela tupela setelait (satellite), hevi bilong tupela wantaim i winim 1,000 paun, na i wok long ron long 17,500 'mile' long wanpela aua, i bam 491 'mile' antap long Earth.

source: Scientists say the explosion caused by the collision was massive.
reference: Ol saintis i tok olsem dispela paia we i kamap taim dispela tupela samting i bam em i traipela nogut tru.

source: They are still trying to determine just how large the crash was and how the Earth will be affected.
reference: Ol i wok long traim yet long painimaut mak bilong dispela bikpela paia na em i bin kamapim wanem kain bagarap long Earth.

source: The United States Strategic Command of the U.S. Department of Defense office is tracking the debris.
reference: United States Strategic Command bilong U.S Department of Defense ofis i wok long painim na makim ol hap hap pat we i stap yet.

source: The result of plotting analysis will be posted to a public website.
reference: Risalt bilong 'plotting analysis' em ol bai i postim long wanpela pablik websait.

source: A doctor who worked at Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania will be charged with aggravated murder after her mother was found dead in the trunk of her car Wednesday, authorities in Ohio say.
reference: Wanpela dokta husat i bin wok long Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania em ol bai i sasim em wantaim 'aggravated murder' bihain long ol i painim mama bilong em i dai na i stap long baksait long kar bilong em long Trinde, ol atoriti long Ohio i tok.

source: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, was found in Blue Ash, Ohio, a suburb approximately 15 miles north of Cincinnati lying on the ground beside the road in a T-shirt and underwear in an apparently heavily medicated state.
reference: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, em ol i bin painim em long Blue Ash, Ohio, long wanpela komuniti we i stap kain olsem 15-pela 'mile' long hap not bilong Cincinnati na em i slip long graun arere long rot na em i werim wanpela 'T-shirt' na pens, na em i luk olsem em i kisim planti marasin na tingting bilong em i no klia.

source: She directed officers to her black Oldsmobile Intrigue which was 500 feet away.
reference: Em i tokim ol ofisa long go long blakpela Oldsmobile Intrigue bilong em we i stap 500 'feet' longwe.

source: There, they found the body of Saroja Balasubramanian, 53, covered with blood-stained blankets.
reference: Long hap, ol i painim bodi bilong Saroja Balasubramanian, 53, i karamap long ol blanket we blut i pas long en.

source: Police said that the body appeared to have been there for about a day.
reference: Ol polis i tok, i luk olsem dispela bodi i stap insait long hap long kain olsem wanpela de.

source: The first cases of the disease this season were reported in late July.
reference: Ol namba wan 'case' bilong dispela sik long dispela sisen (season) em ol i bin ripotim long arere bilong Julai.

source: The disease is carried by pigs, which then migrates to humans through mosquitos.
reference: Dispela sik em ol pik i save karim, na ol moskito i save kisim long pik na givim i go long ol manmeri.

source: The outbreak has prompted the Indian government to undertake such measures as deployment of pig catchers in seriously affected areas, distributing thousands of mosquito curtains and spraying pesticides.
reference: Dispela 'outbreak' i mekim na gavman bilong India i mekim ol dispela samting kain olsem salim ol lain bilong holimpasim pik i go long ol eria we planti pik i sik na i stap, na givim tausen moskito keten (curtain) na spreyim (spray) ol 'pesticide'.

source: Several million vials of encephalitis vaccine have also been promised by the government, which will help prepare health agencies for next year.
reference: Sampela milien 'vials' bilong 'encephalitis' sut marasin em gavman i bin promis long givim, dispela bai redim ol helt ejensi (agency) long mekim wok long nupela yia i kam.

source: Plans for vaccines to be delivered to the historically most affected areas this year were delayed due to lack of funds and low prioritisation relative to other diseases.
reference: Ol plen bilong givim ol dispela sut marasin i go long ol eria we i gat histori bilong planti lain pik i sik long dispela yia i no bin kamap bikos i no gat inap mani na ol i no ting olsem em i wanpela bikpela samting taim ol i skelim em wantaim ol narapela sik.

source: In 1956 Słania moved to Sweden, where three years later he began work for the Swedish Post Office and became their chief engraver.
reference: Long 1956 Slania i muv i go long Sweden, tripela yia bihain em i stat wok long Swedish Post Office na kamap olsem 'chief engraver' bilong ol.

source: He produced over 1,000 stamps for Sweden and 28 other countries.
reference: Em i kamapim moa long 1,000 'stamp' bilong Sweden na 28 narapela kantri.

source: His work is of such recognized quality and detail that he is one of the very few "household names" among philatelists. Some specialize in collecting his work alone.
reference: Wok bilong em i gat gutpela kwaliti we planti laini luksave long en na we em i save mekim ol wanwan liklik samting em i narakain tru we wanwan "lain we i gat nem bilong mekim dispela wok" namel long ol 'philatelist'. Sampela i 'specialize' long sait bilong kolektim ol wok bilong em tasol.

source: His 1,000th stamp was the magnificent "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" by David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl in 2000, which is listed in the Guinness Book of World Records.
reference: Namba 1,000 'stamp' bilong em i nambawan tru "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" we David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl i mekim long 2000, na i stap insait long Guinness Book of World Records.

source: He was also engaged in engraving banknotes for many countries, recent examples of his work including the Prime Ministerial portraits on the front of the new Canadian $5 and $100 bills.
reference: Ol i kisim em tu long mekim 'engraving' long ol 'bank notes' bilong planti kantri, na sampela eksampel bilong ol wok bilong em, em ol 'potrait' bilong ol Prime Minister we i stap long fran bilong nupela $5 na $100 pepa mani bilong Canada.

source: After the accident occurred, Gibson was transported to a hospital but died shortly afterwards.
reference: Bihain long dispela eksiden i kamap, ol i kisim em i go long wanpela haus sik, tasol em i dai sotpela bihain.

source: The truck driver, who is aged 64, was not injured in the crash.
reference: Draiva bilong trak, husat i gat 64-pela krismas, em i no kisim bagarap long dispela 'crash'.

source: The vehicle itself was taken away from the scene of the accident at approximately 1200 GMT on the same day.
reference: Ol i kisim dispela kar i go longwe long ples we eksiden i kamap long em long kain taim olsem 1200 GMT long dispela de yet.

source: A person working in a garage near where the accident occurred said: "There were children waiting to cross the road and they were all screaming and crying."
reference: Wanpela we i wok insait long 'garage' klostu long ples bilong eksiden i tok: "I gat ol pikinini we i wok long wet i stap long i go long narapela sait bilong rot na olgeta i wok long singaut na krai."

source: They all ran back from where the accident had happened.
reference: Olgeta i ron i kam bek long ples we eksiden i bin kamap long en.

source: Other subjects on the agenda in Bali include saving the world's remaining forests, and sharing technologies to help developing nations grow in less-polluting ways.
reference: Ol narapela samting bilong toktok long en taim ol i bung long Bali em pasin bilong seivim ol bikbus bilong ples graun we i stap yet, na serim ol teknoloji long helpim ol kantri we i wok long divelop yet long bihainim ol rot we i no inap long mekim planti polusen (pollution) taim ol i wok long divelop.

source: The U.N. also hopes to finalize a fund to help countries affected by global warming to cope with the impacts.
reference: Na tu, U.N i laik mekim ol laspela wok bilong stretim wanpela 'fund' bilong helpim ol kantri we i wok long pilim ol hevi bilong 'global warming'.

source: The money could go toward flood-proof houses, better water management, and crop diversification.
reference: Dispela mani i ken i go long ol haus we tait wara i no inap long bagarapim ol, gutpela menejmen bilong wara, na planim kainkain kaikai.

source: Fluke wrote that the efforts by some to drown out women from speaking out about women’s health were unsuccessful.
reference: Fluke i bin rait olsem wok bilong sampela lain long stopim ol meri long toktok long ol samting we i no stret long helt bilong ol meri i no bin kamap.

source: She came to this conclusion due to the multitude of positive comments and encouragement sent to her by both female and male individuals urging that contraception medication be considered a medical necessity.
reference: Em i kamap wantaim dispela laspela tingting bikos long planti gutpela toktok na 'encouragment' we ol meri na man i salim i go long em na i tokim em olsem marasin bilong spesim pikinini em i mas kamap olsem wanpela sevis we olgeta haus sik i mas givim.

source: When the fighting ceased after the wounded were transported to the hospital, about 40 of the other remaining inmates stayed in the yard and refused to return to their cells.
reference: Taim dispela pait i pinis bihain long ol i karim ol lain i kisim bagarap i go long haus sik, kain olsem 40-pela bilong ol narapela kalabus lain i stap autsait na i no laik long go bek long sel (cell) bilong ol.

source: Negotiators tried to rectify the situation, but the prisoners' demands are not clear.
reference: Ol i mekim ol toktok bilong stretim dispela hevi, tasol samting we ol kalabus lain i laikim em i no klia.

source: Between 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, a fire was started by the inmates in the yard.
reference: Namel long 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, ol kalabus lain i statim wanpela paia long autsait bilong kalabus bilding.

source: Soon, officers equipped with riot gear entered the yard and cornered the inmates with tear gas.
reference: I no longtaim, ol ofisa we i werim ol 'riot gear' i kam insait long dispela hap na i yusim ol 'tear gas' long mekim ol kalabus lain i no inap long ranawe.

source: Fire rescue crews eventually doused the fire by 11:35 pm.
reference: Ol woklain bilong 'fire rescue' i kisim dispela paia long 11:35 pm.

source: After the dam was built in 1963, the seasonal floods that would spread sediment throughout the river were halted.
reference: Taim ol i pinis long bildim dispela 'dam' long 1963, ol tait wara we i save kamap i save mekim graun i go long olgeta hap bilong wara i stop.

source: This sediment was necessary for creating sandbars and beaches, which served as wildlife habitats.
reference: Ol dispela graun i save kamapim ol 'sandbars' na ol nambis, we i save stap olsem ol ples bilong ol kainkain animal bilong bus.

source: As a result, two fish species have become extinct, and two others have become endangered, including the humpback chub.
reference: Bikos long dispela, tupela 'specie' bilong pis i pinis olgeta, na tupela narapela em klostu i laik pinis olgeta, wanpela bilong ol em i 'humpback chub'.

source: Although the water level will only rise a few feet after the flood, officials are hoping it will be enough to restore eroded sandbars downstream.
reference: Maski level bilong wara bai i go antap long sampela 'feet' tasol bihain long dispela taitwara, ol ofisa i laik olsem em i bai i mas inap long putim ol 'sandbars' long ples we wara i save ron i go daun long en.

source: No tsunami warning has been issued, and according to the Jakarta geophysics agency, no tsunami warning will be issued because the quake did not meet the magnitude 6.5 requirement.
reference: No gat tok lukaut bilong tsunami i bin kamap, na 'geophysics agency' bilong Jakarta i tok olsem, no gat tok lukaut bilong tsunami bai i kamap bikos dispela guria i no kamap long mak bilong 6.5 we i mak bilong givim tok lukaut bilong tsunami.

source: Despite there being no tsunami threat, residents started to panic and began to leave their businesses and homes.
reference: Maski i no gat birua bilong tsunami i stap, ol lain i wok long pret na i stat long lusim ol bisnis na haus bilong ol.

source: Although Winfrey was tearful in her farewell, she made it clear to her fans she will be back.
reference: Maski Winfrey i wok long krai long taim ol i tok gutbai long em, em i tokaut klia long ol lain i save laik long lukim em olsem em bai i kam bek.

source: "This is not going to be goodbye. This is the closing of one chapter and the opening of a new one."
reference: "Dispela em i no gutbai. Dispela em i taim bilong pasim wanpela sapta na opim nupela sapta."

source: Final results from Namibian presidential and parliamentary elections have indicated that the incumbent president, Hifikepunye Pohamba, has been reelected by a large margin.
reference: Ol laspela risalt bilong ileksen bilong presiden na palimen bilong Nambia soim olsem presiden, Hifikepunye Pohamba, em ol i makim em wantaim bikpela namba tru long kamap presiden gen.

source: The ruling party, South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), also retained a majority in the parliamentary elections.
reference: Dispela pati we i go pas long gavman, South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), i winim bikpela namba bilong ol sia insait long ileksen bilong palimen.

source: Coalition and Afghan troops moved into the area to secure the site and other coalition aircraft have been sent to assist.
reference: Ol 'coalition' na soldia bilong Afghanistan i muv i go long dispela eria long kisim dispela hap na ol i salim ol narapela balus bilong ol 'coalition' long helpim ol long mekim dispela.

source: The crash occurred high up in mountainous terrain, and is believed to have been the result of hostile fire.
reference: Dispela 'crash' i kamap antap long ples we i gat planti maunten, ol i ting olsem dispela i kamap bikos ol birua i sutim em long gan.

source: Efforts to search for the crash site are being met by bad weather and harsh terrain.
reference: Ol wok bilong painim dispela hap we 'crash' i kamap i bin bungim weda (weather) nogut na ples we i hat long man i go long en.

source: The medical charity Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres and the World Health Organisation say it is the worst outbreak recorded in the country.
reference: Ol 'medical charity' Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres na the World Health Organisation i tok olsem dispela em i 'outbreak' we i stap long mak nogut tru insait long dispela kantri.

source: Spokesman for Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman said: "Angola is heading for its worst ever outbreak and the situation remains very bad in Angola," he said.
reference: Mausman bilong Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman i tok: "Angola i wok long go long mak we i nogut tru long dispela 'outbreak' na dispela hevi em i stap nogut tru long Angola," em i tok.

source: The games kicked off at 10:00am with great weather and apart from mid morning drizzle which quickly cleared up, it was a perfect day for 7's rugby.
reference: Ol gem i stat long 10:00am wantaim gutpela weda na maski i bin i gat liklik ren long moning, em i pinis hariap, dispela de em i gutpela tru long pilai ragbi 7's.

source: Tournament top seeds South Africa started on the right note when they had a comfortable 26 - 00 win against 5th seeded Zambia.
reference: South Africa em i nambawan tim insait long dispela tonamen (tournament) na em i stat gut taim em i winim tim bilong Zambia we i stap namba 5 insait long tonamen 26 - 00.

source: Looking decidedly rusty in the game against their southern sisters, South Africa however steadily improved as the tournament progressed.
reference: Ol i luk olsem ol i no save gut long pilai wantaim ol sista bilong ol long hap saut, tasol taim tonamen (tournament) i wok long kamap, ol South Africa i wok long pilai gut moa.

source: Their disciplined defence, ball handling skills and excellent team work made them stand out and it was clear that this was the team to beat.
reference: Disaplin (discipline) bilong defens, we ol i wok long hendelim bal na gutpela tim wok i mekim ol i pilai gut tru na olgeta lain i save olsem ol narapela tim i mas traim long winim ol.

source: Officials for the city of Amsterdam and the Anne Frank Museum state that the tree is infected with a fungus and poses a public health hazard as they argue that it was in imminent danger of falling over.
reference: Ol ofisa bilong Armsterdam siti na Anne Frank Museum i tok olsem dispela diwai em wanpela 'fungus' i bagarapim em na em i ken kamapim bagarap long helt bilong pablik taim ol i tok olsem em i laik pundaun.

source: It had been scheduled to be cut down on Tuesday, but was saved after an emergency court ruling.
reference: Ol i bin tok olsem ol bai i katim em i go daun long Tunde, tasol wanpela imejensi kot 'ruling' i seivim dispela diwai.

source: All of the cave entrances, which were named "The Seven Sisters", are at least 100 to 250 meters (328 to 820 feet) in diameter.
reference: Olgeta maus bilong hul bilong ston, we ol i kolim "The Seven Sisters", sais bilong namel bilong ol em ol i gat 100 i go long 250 mita (328 i go long 820 'feet') o moa.

source: Infrared images show that the temperature variations from night and day show that they are likely caves.
reference: Ol piksa we ol i kisim wantaim 'infrared' lait i soim olsem senis we i kamap long temprita (temperature) long de na nait i soim olsem dispela ol ples em ol hul bilong ston.

source: "They are cooler than the surrounding surface in the day and warmer at night.
reference: Ol i stap kol moa long ol ples we i raunim ol long san na long nait ol i hot moa long ol ples we i raunim ol.

source: Their thermal behavior is not as steady as large caves on Earth that often maintain a fairly constant temperature, but it is consistent with these being deep holes in the ground," said Glen Cushing of the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizona University located in Flagstaff, Arizona.
reference: "'Thermal behavior' bilong ol i no stap wankain olsem ol bikpela hul bilong ston long Earth we i save i gat wanpela kain tempritsa (temperature), tasol ol i stap wankain olsem tempritsa bilong ol dip hol i stap long graun," Glen Cushing bilong United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team na bilong Northern Arizona University we i stap long Flagstaff, Arizona i tok.

source: In France, voting has traditionally been a low-tech experience: voters isolate themselves in a booth, put a pre-printed sheet of paper indicating their candidate of choice into an envelope.
reference: Long France, pasin bilong 'vote' em i no pasin bilong yusim teknoloji: ol vota (voter) i save go long wanpela tebol, putim wanpela we ol i bin prinim pinis we i soim wanem kendidet (candidate) ol i laik makim i go long wanpela envelop (envelope).

source: After officials verify the voter's identity, the voter drops the envelope into the ballot box and signs the voting roll.
reference: Taim ol ofisa i sekim nem na ples bilong dispela vota (voter) pinis, dispela vota bai putim dispela envelop (envelope) i go insait long 'ballot box' na putim siknesa bilong em long list bilong ol lain i kam na makim kendidet bilong ol.

source: French electoral law rather strictly codifies the proceedings.
reference: Lo bilong France long ileksen i tok olsem ol i mas putim ol 'code' long ol dispela wok bilong makim kendidet.

source: Since 1988, ballot boxes must be transparent so that voters and observers can witness that no envelopes are present at the start of the vote and that no envelopes are added except those of the duly counted and authorized voters.
reference: Stat long 1988 na i kam inap long nau, olgeta 'ballot box' i mas i stap ples klia na ol lain bilong vot (vote) na ol lain bilong was long vot i ken lukim olsem i no gat envelop (envelope) i stap long stat bilong vot na i no gat narapela envelop ol i putim gen i go antap long ol envelop we ol i kaunim pinis na olgeta i kam long ol lain we i gat atoriti long vot.

source: Candidates can send representatives to witness every part of the process. In the evening, votes are counted by volunteers under heavy supervision, following specific procedures.
reference: Ol kendidet (candidate) i ken salim ol lain we i makim ol long go na witnesim olgeta wanwan hap bilong wok. Long avinun, ol volentia (volunteer) i save kaunim ol vot (vote) na i gat ol lain i save bihainim ol prosidia (procedure) bilong supavaisim (supervise) wok bilong ol.

source: ASUS Eee PC, earlier launched world-wide for cost-saving and functionality factors, became a hot topic in 2007 Taipei IT Month.
reference: ASUS Eee PC, we ol i bin mekim presentesen bilong em i go long olgeta hap bilong graun bikos em i ken seivim man na em i ken mekim planti impoten wok, em i kamap olsem wanpela bikpela topik we ol lain i wok long toktok long em long 2007 Taipei IT Month.

source: But the consumer market on laptop computer will be radically varied and changed after ASUS was awarded in the 2007 Taiwan Sustainable Award by Executive Yuan of the Republic of China.
reference: Tasol maket bilong salim 'laptop' i go long pablik' bai i gat kainkain prodak na i senis olgeta bihain long ASUS i kisim 2007 Taiwan Sustainable Award we Executive Yuan bilong Republic of China i givim.

source: The station's web site describes the show as "old school radio theater with a new and outrageous geeky spin!"
reference: Stesin bilong dispela websait kolim dispela 'show' olsem "wanpela redio drama we i bihainim ol stail bilong bipo tasol i gat nupela na narapela kain kleva (clever) stail long em!"

source: In its early days, the show was featured solely at the long-running internet radio site TogiNet Radio, a site focused on talk radio.
reference: Long ol nupela de bilong em, dispela 'show' i save kamap long redio bilong intanet TogiNet Radio, dispela em i wanpela websait we i save gat ol toktok bilong redio long en.

source: In late 2015, TogiNet established AstroNet Radio as a subsidiary station.
reference: Long pinis bilong 2015, TogiNet i kamapim AstroNet Radio olsem ol redio stesin i kam aninit long em.

source: The show originally featured amateur voice actors, local to East Texas.
reference: Dispela 'show' em pastaim em ol 'voice actor' we i no gat planti save na ekspiriens (experience) i ektim, na ol i bilong East Texas.

source: Widespread looting reportedly continued overnight, as law enforcement officers were not present on Bishkek's streets.
reference: Pasin bilong stilim ol samting long kainkain hap i kontinu (continue) long nait i kam inap long moning, na ol ofisa bilong lo i no stap long ol han rot bilong Bishkek.

source: Bishkek was described as sinking into a state of "anarchy" by one observer, as gangs of people roamed the streets and plundered stores of consumer goods.
reference: Wanpela man we i wok long skelim dispela samting i bin tok olsem Bishkek i wok long kamap long mak we "i no gat lo na oda", taim ol grup manmeri i raun long ol han rot na i stilim ol samting long ol stoa.

source: Several Bishkek residents blamed protesters from the south for the lawlessness.
reference: Sampela bilong ol lain i save stap long Bishkek i sutim tok long ol lain i mekim protes (protest) long saut olsem ol i kamapim dispela pasin bilong brukim lo.

source: South Africa have defeated the All Blacks (New Zealand) in a rugby union Tri Nations match at the Royal Bafokeng Stadium in Rustenburg, South Africa.
reference: South Africa i bin winim All Blacks (New Zealand) long 'rugby union' long Tri Nations geim (game) long Royal Bafokeng Stadium long Rustenburg, South Africa.

source: The final score was a one-point victory, 21 to 20, ending the All Blacks' 15 game winning streak.
reference: Dispela laspela sko (score) em i wanpela poin win, 21 na 20, na i pinisim 15-pela geim (game ) we All Blacks i bin winim.

source: For the Springboks, it ended a five-match losing streak.
reference: Long ol Springboks, em i pinis bilong 5-pela gem we ol i lus i kam inap nau.

source: It was the final match for the All Blacks, who had already won the trophy two weeks ago.
reference: Dispela em i laspela geim (game) bilong ol All Blacks, husat i bin winim pinis dispela 'trophy' long tupela wik i go pinis.

source: The final match of the series will take place at Ellis Park in Johannesburg next week, when the Springboks play Australia.
reference: Dispela laspela geim (game) bilong 'series' bai kamap long Ellis Park long Johannesburg long wik i kam, taim ol Sprinboks i pilai agensim ol Australia.

source: A moderate earthquake shook western Montana at 10:08 p.m. on Monday.
reference: Wanpela guria we i strong liklik i seksekim 'western' Montana long 10:08 p.m long Mande.

source: No immediate reports of damage have been received by the United States Geological Survey (USGS) and its National Earthquake Information Center.
reference: No gat ripot i kamap yet long ol bagarap i go kamap long United States Geological Survey (USGS) na National Earthquake Information Center bilong em.

source: The earthquake was centered about 20 km (15 miles) north-northeast of Dillon, and about 65 km (40 miles) south of Butte.
reference: Dispela guria i stap namel long 20 km (15 'miles) long 'north-northeast' bilong Dillion, na kain olsem 65 km (40 'miles') saut long Butte.

source: The strain of bird flu lethal to humans, H5N1, has been confirmed to have infected a dead wild duck, found on Monday, in marshland near Lyon in the east of France.
reference: Dispela 'strain' bilong 'bird flu' em i nogut tru long ol manmeri, H5N1, na ol savemanmeri i tokaut olsem trutru dispela sik i go long wanpela wail pato na em i dai, na ol i painim em long Mande, long ol ples tais klostu long Lyon long hap is bilong France.

source: France is the seventh country in the European Union to suffer this virus; following Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece and Italy.
reference: France em i namba seventin kantri long European Union long kisim taim nogut long dispela vaires (virus); bihain long Austria, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece na Italy.

source: Suspected cases of H5N1 in Croatia and Denmark remain unconfirmed.
reference: Ol 'case' we ol i saspekim H5N1 long Croatia na Denmark em ol i no painimaut yet olsem ol i tru tru, o nogat.

source: Chambers had sued God for "widespread death, destruction and terrorization of millions upon millions of the Earth's inhabitants."
reference: Chambers i kisim God i go long kot long "dai i kamap long olgeta hap bilong graun, bagarap na pen na hevi i kamap long planti milien manmeri bilong Earth."

source: Chambers, an agnostic, argues that his lawsuit is "frivolous" and "anybody can sue anybody."
reference: Chambers, wanpela man we i no bilip long God, i tok pait olsem kot pepa bilong bilong em, em i "no bikpela samting" na "olgeta man i ken kisim narapela i go long kot."

source: The story presented in the French opera, by Camille Saint-Saens, is of an artist "whose life is dictated by a love for drugs and Japan."
reference: Dispela stori em ol i soim long 'opera' bilong France, we Camille Saint-Saens i raitim, em i stori bilong 'artist' "we laip bilong em i bihainim laikim bilong em long ol drag (drug) na Japan."

source: As a result, the performers smoke cannabis joints on stage, and the theatre itself is encouraging the audience to join in.
reference: Olsem na, ol lain bilong ekt i smokim mariwana long 'stage', na 'theatre' i strongim tingting bilong ol lain i sindaun na lukluk long bihainim ol.

source: Former House Speaker Newt Gingrich, Texas governor Rick Perry, and Congresswoman Michele Bachmann finished in fourth, fifth, and sixth place, respectively.
reference: House Speaker bilong bipo Newt Gingrich, gavana bilong Texas Rick Perry, na Congresswoman Michele Bachmann i pinis namba foa, faiv na siks.

source: After the results came in, Gingrich lauded Santorum, but had tough words for Romney, on whose behalf negative campaign advertisements were aired in Iowa against Gingrich.
reference: Biahin long ol risalt i kam autsait, Gingrich i apim nem bilong Santorum, tasol em i gat ol strongpela toktok long Romney, husat i bin mekim ol negatif kempen edvetismen (campaign advertisment) long Gingrich long Iowa.

source: Perry stated that he would "return to Texas to assess the results of tonight's caucus, determine whether there is a path forward for myself in this race", but later said that he would remain in the race and compete in the January 21 South Carolina primary.
reference: Perry i tok olsem em bai "go bek long Texas long skelim ol risalt bilong miting bilong dispela nait, na skelim sapos i gat rot i stap bilong mi long dispela resis", tasol bihain em i tok olsem em bai i stap insait log dispela resis na resis long Jenueri 21 South Carolina primary.

source: Bachmann, who won the Ames Straw Poll in August, decided to end her campaign.
reference: Bachmann, husat i winim Ames Straw Poll long Ogas, i mekim disisen long stopim kempen (campaign) bilong em.

source: The photographer was transported to Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, where he subsequently died.
reference: Ol i karim dispela man biling kisim foto i go long Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, we em i stap i go na em i dai.

source: He was reportedly aged in his 20s. In a statement, Bieber said "[w]hile I was not present nor directly involved with this tragic accident, my thoughts and prayers are with the family of the victim."
reference: Ol i tok olsem em i gat 20 samting krismas. Long wanpela tok save bilong Bieber, em i tok olsem "maski mi i no stap long dispela ples na mi no i stap insait long dispela eksiden, ol tingting na prea bilong mi i stap wantaim ol famili bilong dispela man husat i dai."

source: Entertainment news website TMZ understands the photographer stopped his vehicle on the other side of Sepulveda Boulevard and attempted to take pictures of the police stop before crossing the road and continuing, prompting the California Highway Patrol police officer conducting the traffic stop to order him back across, twice.
reference: Websait we i save givim nius long sait bilong 'entertainment' TMZ i save olsem dispela man bilong kisim foto i stopim kar bilong em long narapela sait bilong Sepulveda Boulevard na i wok long traim long kisim ol piksa bilong ol polis i stopim kar na bihain em i go long narapela sait bilong rot na i kontinu (continue) long kisim foto, dispela i mekim na California Highway Patrol polis ofisa husat i wok long stopim ol kar i givim oda long em tupela taim long em i mas go bek.

source: According to police, the driver of the vehicle that hit the photographer is unlikely to face criminal charges.
reference: Ol polis i tok olsem, i luk olsem draiva bilong dispela kar we i bamim dispela man bilong kisim foto bai i no inap long kisim ol sas.

source: With only eighteen medals available a day, a number of countries have failed to make the medal podium.
reference: I save i gat etinpela 'medal' tasol bilong winim long wanwan de, sampela kantri i no bin winim wanpela 'medal' na go long 'medal podium' long kisim.

source: They include the Netherlands, with Anna Jochemsen finishing ninth in the women's standing class in the Super-G yesterday, and Finland with Katja Saarinen finishing tenth in the same event.
reference: Dispela em Netherlands, wantaim Anna Jochemsen we i pinis long namba nain ples long 'women's standing class' insait long Super-G long aste, na Finland wantaim Katja Saarinen we i pinis namba ten insait long dispela seim (same) geim (game).

source: Australia's Mitchell Gourley finished eleventh in the men's standing Super-G. Czech competitor Oldrich Jelinek finished sixteenth in the men's sitting Super-G.
reference: Mitchell Gourley bilong Australia i pinis long namba ileven ples insait long 'men's standing' long Super-G. Pleiya (player) bilong Czech Oldrich Jelinek i pinis long namba sikstin ples insait long 'men's sitting' long Super-G.

source: Arly Velasquez of Mexico finished fifteenth in the men's sitting Super-G. New Zealand's Adam Hall finished ninth in the men's standing Super-G.
reference: Arly Velasquez bilong Mexicoi pinis long namba fiftin ples insait long 'men's sitting' long Super-G. Pleiya (player) bilong New Zealand s Adam Hall i pinis long namba nain ples insait long 'men's standing' long Super-G.

source: Poland's men's visually impaired skier Maciej Krezel and guide Anna Ogarzynska finished thirteenth in the Super-G. South Korea's Jong Seork Park finished twenty-fourth in the men's sitting Super-G.
reference: Pleiya (player) bilong Poland insait long 'men's visually impaired' Maciej Krezel na 'guide' bilong em Anna Ogarzynska i pinis long namba tetin ples insait long Super-G. Pleiya bilong South Korea Jong Seork Park i pinis long namba twenti-foa ples insait long 'men's sitting' long Super-G.

source: UN peacekeepers, whom arrived in Haiti after the 2010 earthquake, are being blamed for the spread of the disease which started near the troop's encampment.
reference: Ol 'peacekeepers' bilong UN, husat i bin kam long Haiti bihain long bikpela guria bilong yia 2010, em ol lain i sutim tok long ol olsem ol i mekim dispela sik i go long ol manmeri na dispela sik i stat klostu long kem bilong ol.

source: According to the lawsuit, waste from the UN camp was not properly sanitized, causing bacteria to enter the tributary of the Artibonite River, one of Haiti's largest.
reference: Ol pepa bilong kot i tok olsem, ol rabis long kem bilong UN em ol i no kilim gut ol binatang long en, dispela i mekim na ol binatang i go insait long wara Artibonite, wanpela bilong ol bikpela wara insait long kantri Haiti.

source: Prior to the arrival of troops, Haiti had not encountered problems related to the disease since the 1800s.
reference: Bipo long ol soldia i kam kamap, Haiti i no bin i gat problem long sait bilong sik stat long ol yia insait long 1800 i kam inap nau.

source: The Haitian Institute for Justice and Democracy has referenced independent studies that suggest the Nepalese UN peacekeeping battalion unknowingly brought the disease to Haiti.
reference: Institut bilong Haiti long Justice na Democracy i bin mekim wanpela stadi bilong em yet we i painimaut olsem ol soldia bilong kantri Nepal insait long dispela grup bilong 'peacekeeping' i no save na i karim dispela sik i kam long Haiti.

source: Danielle Lantagne, a UN expert on the disease, stated the outbreak was likely caused by the peacekeepers.
reference: Danielle Lantagne, em i wanpela savemeri bilong UN long sait bilong sik, em i tok olsem dispela sik i mas stat wantaim ol 'peacekeepers'.

source: Hamilton confirmed Howard University Hospital admitted the patient in stable condition.
reference: Hamilton i tokaut olsem tru tru Howard University Hospital i kisim dispela sikman na em i stap long gutpela kondisen.

source: The patient had been to Nigeria, where some cases of the Ebola virus have occurred.
reference: Dispela sikman i bin go long Nigeri, we i gat sampela 'case' bilong Ebola i kamap long en.

source: The hospital has followed protocol for infection control, including separating the patient from others to prevent possible infection of others.
reference: Dispela haus sik i bihainim rot bilong banisim ol yet long binatang nogut, na ol i putim dispela sikman longwe long ol narapela sikmanmeri long banisim em long givim dispela sik i go long narapela.

source: Before The Simpsons Simon had worked on several shows in various positions.
reference: Bipo long The Simpsons Simon i bin wok long kainkain posisen bilong ol sampela 'show'.

source: During the 1980s he worked on shows such as Taxi, Cheers, and The Tracy Ullman Show.
reference: Long ol yia insait long 1980 em i bin wok long ol 'show' kain olsem Taxi, Cheers, na The Tracy Ullman Show.

source: In 1989 he helped create The Simpsons with Brooks and Groening, and was responsible for hiring the show's first writing team.
reference: Long 1989 em i helpim long kamapim The Simpsons wantaim Brooks na Groening, na em i bin mekim wok bilong kisim namba wan tim bilong raitim stori bilong dispela 'show'.

source: Despite leaving the show in 1993 he kept the title of executive producer, and continued to receive tens of millions of dollars every season in royalties.
reference: Maski em i lusim dispela 'show' long 1993 em i holim yet dispela taitel bilong 'executive producer', em i kontinu (continue) long kisim ten milien dola long olgeta sisen (season) olsem 'royalty' mani.

source: Earlier the Chinese news agency Xinhua reported a plane to be hijacked.
reference: Sampela taim i go pinsim nius ejensi (agency) bilong China Xinhua i mekim ripot olsem sampela lain i holimpasim wanpela balus.

source: Later reports then stated the plane received a bomb threat and was diverted back to Afghanistan, landing in Kandahar.
reference: Bihain ol ripot i tok olsem dispela balus i kisim wanpela 'bomb threat' olsem na ol salim em i go bek long Afghanistan, na em i go daun long Kandahar.

source: The early reports say the plane was diverted back to Afghanistan after being denied an emergency landing in Ürümqi.
reference: Ol ripot i bin kam pas i tok olsem ol i salim dispela balus i go bek long Afghanistan bipo long ol i tok nogat long em long pundaun long Ürümqi.

source: Air accidents are common in Iran, which has an aging fleet that is poorly maintained both for civil and military operations.
reference: Ol eksiden we i kamap long skai i save kamap planti taim long Iran, we i gat ol olpela balus na ol i no save mentenim gut long mekim ol operesen bilong pablik na bilong militeri (military).

source: International sanctions have meant that new aircraft cannot be purchased.
reference: Ol intanesinol lo we i tok tambu long ol long baim samting i mekim na ol i no inap long baim nupela balus.

source: Earlier this week, a police helicopter crash killed three people and wounded three more.
reference: Sampela taim i go pinis long dispela wik, wanpela helikopta (helicopter) i 'crash' na i kilim tripela lain na narapela tripela i kisim bagarap long bodi bilong ol.

source: Last month Iran saw its worst air disaster in years when an airliner heading to Armenia crashed, killing the 168 on board.
reference: Long mun i go pinis Iran i kisim wanpela bikpela disasta (disaster) bihain long planti yia taim wanpela balus we i wok long i go long Armenia i 'crash', na i kilim 168 manmeri we i stap long balus.

source: The same month saw another airliner overrun a runway at Mashhad and strike a wall, killing seventeen.
reference: Long dispela seim (same) mun narapela balus i ran i go autsait long mak bilong 'runway' long Mashhad na i bamim wanpela wol, na kilim seventinpela lain.

source: Aerosmith have cancelled their remaining concerts on their tour.
reference: Aerosmith i bin stopim ol narapela konset (concert) we i stap yet long raun bilong ol.

source: The rock band was due to tour the United States and Canada until September 16.
reference: Dispela 'rock band' i sapos long raun long United States na Canada i go inap long Septemba 16.

source: They have cancelled the tour after lead singer Steven Tyler was injured after he fell off stage while performing on August 5.
reference: Ol i stopim ol raun bilong ol bihain long 'lead singer' bilong ol Steven Tyler i kisim bagarap long bodi bilong em taim em i pundaun i kamdaun long 'stage' taim em i wok long singsing long Ogas 5.

source: Murray lost the first set in a tie break after both men held each and every serve in the set.
reference: Murray i lusim namba wan 'set' bilong em insait long wanpela 'tie breal' taim tupela man wantaim i kisim olgeta 'serve' insait long dispela 'set'.

source: Del Potro had the early advantage in the second set, but this too required a tie break after reaching 6-6.
reference: Del Potro i bin gat sans pastaim insait long namba tu 'set', tasol dispela tu em i nidim wanpela 'tie break' taim i kamap 6-6.

source: Potro received treatment to his shoulder at this point but managed to return to the game.
reference: Potro i kisim wanpela tritmen long solda (shoulder) bilong em long dispela taim na i go bek long pilai.

source: The program started at 8:30 p.m. local time (15.00 UTC).
reference: Dispela progrem i stat long 8:30 p.m. long lokel taim (15.00 UTC).

source: Famous singers across the country presented bhajans, or devotional songs, to Shri Shyam's feet.
reference: Ol singa (singer) we planti lain i save long ol long olgeta hap bilong kantri i mekim ol bhajan, o ol lotu singsing long lek bilong Shri Shyam.

source: Singer Sanju Sharma started the evening, followed by Jai Shankar Choudhary. esented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.
reference: Singa (singer) Sanju Sharma i stat long dispela avinun, na Jai Shankar Choudhary i kam bihain long em. Na tu, Lakkha Singh i mekim singsing chhappan bhog bhajan. Singa, Raju Khandelwal i wok long singsing wantaim em.

source: Then, Lakkha Singh took the lead in singing the bhajans.
reference: Bihain, Lakkha Singh i go pas long singim ol bhajan.

source: 108 plates of Chhappan Bhog (in Hinduism, 56 different edible items, like, sweets, fruits, nuts, dishes etc. which are offered to deity) were served to Baba Shyam.
reference: 108-pela plet bilong Chhappan Bhog (long Hinduisim, 56-pela kainkain samting bilong kaikai, kain olsem ol swit kaikai, frut, ol sit, na ol kaikai we ol i kukim pinis na sampela moa we ol bai i mekim ofa long olgeta de) em ol i givim i go long Baba Shyam.

source: Lakkha Singh presented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.
reference: Na tu, Lakkha Singhmekim singsing chhappan bhog bhajan. Singa, Raju Khandelwal i wok long singsing wantaim em.

source: At Thursday's keynote presentation of the Tokyo Game Show, Nintendo president Satoru Iwata unveiled the controller design for the company's new Nintendo Revolution console.
reference: Long presentesen bilong Fonde long Tokyo Game show, presiden bilong Nintendo Satoru Iwata i presentim wanpela 'controller design' bilong kampani long nupela geim (game) bilong em Nintendo Revolution.

source: Resembling a television remote, the controller uses two sensors placed near the user's television to triangulate its position in three-dimensional space.
reference: Dispela 'controller' i luk olsem wanpela 'remote controller' bilong televisen, dispela 'controller' i yusim tupela 'sensors' we i stap klostu long teleiven bilong dispela 'user' long mekim 'trangulate' long 'three dimensional space'.

source: This will allow players to control actions and movements in video games by moving the device through the air.
reference: Dispela bai mekim ol pleiya (player) i ken kontrolim ol eksen na muvmen insait long ol 'video game' taim ol muv.

source: Giancarlo Fisichella lost control of his car and ended the race very soon after the start.
reference: Giancarlo Fisichella i no inap long kontrolim kar bilong em na stop long resis liklik taim tasol bihain long stat bilong resis.

source: His teammate Fernando Alonso was in the lead for most of the race, but ended it right after his pit-stop, probably because a badly tucked right front wheel.
reference: Wanpela long tim bilong em Fernando Alonso i stap long fran olgeta taim insait long resis, tasol em i stop long resis taim em i mekim wanpela 'pit stop', i luk olsem dispela i kamap biko long wanpela fran wil (wheel) we ol i no putim gut.

source: Michael Schumacher ended his race not long after Alonso, because of the suspension damage in the numerous battles during the race.
reference: I no longtaim bihain long Alonso Michael Schumacher i pinis long resis, bikos 'saspension' bilong em i bagarap taim em i wok long pait long winim spes insait long resis.

source: "She’s very cute and sings quite well, too," he said according to a transcript of the news conference.
reference: "Em i luk nais tru na tu, em i save singsing gut," em i tok olsem insait long wanpela 'news conference' rekoding.

source: "I was moved every time we did a rehearsal on this, from the bottom of my heart."
reference: Mi save pilim sampela samting olgeta taim mipela i save mekim prektis long dispela, mi save pilim insait long lewa bilong mi.

source: Around 3 minutes into the launch, an on-board camera showed numerous pieces of insulation foam break away from the fuel tank.
