reference: Long kain olsem 3-pela minit long taim ol i salim em i go long 'space', wanpela kamera we i stap long em i soim olsem kainkain hap bilong 'insulation foam' i wok long bruk long 'fuel tank'.

source: However, they are not thought to have caused any damage to the shuttle.
reference: Tasol, ol i no ting olsem dispela samting i mekim na bagarap i kamap long dispela 'shuttle'.

source: NASA's shuttle program chief N. Wayne Hale Jr. said the foam had fallen "after the time we are concerned about."
reference: Bos bilong 'shuttle' progrem bilong NASA N. Wayne Hale Jr. i tok olsem ol 'foam' i bin pundaun "bihain long taim we mipela i wok long tingting planti long en."

source: Five minutes into the display a wind starts rolling in, about a minute later, the wind is reaching 70km/h... then the rain comes, but so hard and so large that it slaps your skin like a needle, then hail fell from the sky, people panicking and screaming and running over each other.
reference: Faivepela minit bilong dispela 'display' na wanpela win i stat long blo, wanpela minit bihain, dispela win i kamap long mak bilong 70km/h... orait ren i kam, tasol em i pundaun strong nogut tru na sais bilong em i bikpela tru na em i paitim skin bilong yu olsem wanpela nidel (needle), orait bihain ais i pundaun olsem ston long skai, ol manmeri i pret na singaut na ran antap long wanpela narapela.

source: I lost my sister and her friend, and on my way there were two disabled people in wheelchairs, people just jumping over and pushing them," Armand Versace said.
reference: Mi lusim susa bilong mi na pren bilong em, na taim mi go long hap i gat tupela lain i sindaun long 'wheelchair', na ol i manmeri i kalapim tupela na pusim tupela tasol," Armand Versace.

source: NHK also reported that the Kashiwazaki Kariwa nuclear power plant in Niigata prefecture was operating normally.
reference: NHK tu i ripot olsem Kashiwazaki Kariwa 'nuclear power plant' long Niigata provins i wok long wok gut.

source: Hokuriku Electric Power Co. reported no effects from the earthquake and that the Number 1 and 2 reactors at its Shika nuclear power plant were shut down.
reference: Hokuriku Electric Power Co. i ripot olsem i no gat sain bilong guria na Number 1 na Number 2 reactor we i stap long Shika 'nuclear power plant' em ol i pasim.

source: It is reported that some 9400 homes in the region are without water and approximately 100 without electricity.
reference: Ol i mekim ripot olsem klostu 9400 haus long dispela rijen i no gat wata na klostu 100 bilong ol i no gar ilektrisiti (electricity).

source: Some roads have been damaged, railway service interrupted in the affected areas, and the Noto Airport in Ishikawa prefecture remains closed.
reference: Sampela bilong ol rot em ol i bin bagarap, i no gat sevis bilong trein (train) long ol eria we guria i kamap long en, na Noto Airport long Ishikawa provins em i pas yet.

source: One bomb exploded outside the governor general's office.
reference: Wanpela bom i pairap autsait long ofis bilong gavana jenerel.

source: Three more bombs exploded near government buildings in a period of two hours.
reference: Tripela moa bom i pairap klostu long ol bilding bilong gavman insait long tupela aua.

source: Some reports put the official death toll at eight, and official reports confirm that up to 30 were injured; but final numbers are not yet known.
reference: Sampela ripot i tok olsem namba bilong ol lain i dai em i et, na ripot i kam long ol ofis i tok olsem 30-pela lain i kisim bagarap; tasol tru tru namba em ol i no save yet.

source: Both cyanuric acid and melamine were found in urine samples from pets that died after consuming contaminated pet food.
reference: Cyanuric acid na melamine em ol i bin painim ol insait long ol 'sample' bilong pispis bilong ol 'pes' we i bin dai taim ol i kaikai dispela kaikai bilong animal we i posin insait long em.

source: The two compounds react with one another to form crystals that may block kidney function, researchers at the university said.
reference: Dispela tupela 'compound' i save 'react' wantaim long kamapim ol 'crystal' we i ken blokim kidni long mekim wok bilong em, ol lain i go pas long risets long univesiti i tok.

source: The researchers observed crystals formed in cat urine by the addition of melamine and cyanuric acid.
reference: Ol lain i go pas long risets i lukim olsem ol dispela 'crystal' i kamap insait long pispis bilong pusi taim ol i putim 'melamine' na 'cyanuric acid'.

source: The composition of these crystals matches those found in the urine of affected pets when compared by infrared spectroscopy (FTIR).
reference: 'Composition' bilong dispela 'crystal' i wankain olsem bilong ol dispela we o i bin painim insait long pispis bilong ol animal we i kaikai dispela kaikai taim ol i skelim aninit long 'infrared spectroscopy (FTIR).

source: I don't know if you realize it or not, but most of the goods from Central America came into this country duty-free.
reference: Mi no save sapos yu luksave long dispela o nogat, tasol planti bilong ol kago i kam long Central America i kam insait long kantri 'duty-free'.

source: Yet eighty percent of our goods were taxed through tariffs in Central American countries. we treat you.
reference: Tasol eti pesen bilong ol kago bilong mipela em ol i save putim takis long em insait long ol 'tarriff' long ol kantri bilong Central America.

source: That didn't seem to make sense to me; it certainly wasn't fair.
reference: Mi no inap long klia gut long dispela; em i no stret.

source: All I say to people is you treat us the way we treat you.
reference: Mi laik tokim ol manmeri olsem yu mekim mekim wankain pasin long mipela olsem mipela i bin mekim long yu.

source: California Governor Arnold Schwarzenegger signed into law a bill that bans the sale or rental of violent video games to minors.
reference: California Governor Arnold Schwarzenegger i sainim wanpela 'bill' na mekim em i kamap olsem lo tru tru we i stopim ol lain long salim o rentim o geim (game) bilong pait i go long ol pikinini.

source: The bill requires violent video games sold in the state of California to be labeled with a decal reading "18" and makes their sale to a minor punishable by a fine of $1000 per offense.
reference: Dispela 'bill' em i tok olsem ol vidio geim (video game) bilong pait we ol i salim long Carlifonia em ol i mas makim wantaimwanpela 'decal reading' "18" na mekim ol lain i brukim dispela lo long baim $1000 long wanwan taim ol i brukim dispela lo.

source: The Director of Public Prosecutions, Kier Starmer QC, gave a statement this morning announcing the prosecution of both Huhne and Pryce.
reference: Director of Public Prosecutions, Kier Starmer QC, i givim wanpela tok save long moning we i tokaut olsem ol bai kotim Huhne na Pryce.

source: Huhne has resigned and he will be replaced in the Cabinet by Ed Davey MP. Norman Lamb MP is expected to take the Business Minister job Davey is vacating.
reference: Huhne i risain (resign) em Ed Davey MP bai i kisim ples bilong em long Cabinet. Norman Lamb MP bai i kisim wok bilong Business Minister we Davey bai i lusim.

source: Huhne and Pryce are scheduled to appear at the Westminster Magistrates Court on February 16.
reference: Taim bilong Huhne na Pryce long kamap long Westminster Magistrates Court em long Febueri 16.

source: The fatalities were Nicholas Alden, 25, and Zachary Cuddeback, 21. Cuddeback had been the driver.
reference: Ol lain we i dai em Nicholas Alden, 25, na Zachary Cuddeback, 21. Cuddeback i bin draivim kar.

source: Edgar Veguilla received arm and jaw wounds while Kristoffer Schneider was left requiring reconstructive surgery for his face.
reference: Edgar Veguilla i kism bagarap long han antap na bun bilong maus na Kristoffer Schneider bai nidim 'reconstructive surgery' long pes bilong em.

source: Uka's weapon failed whilst pointed at a fifth man's head. Schneider has ongoing pain, blindness in one eye, a missing section of skull and a face rebuilt from titanium.
reference: Samting bilong Uka long pait i no bin wok taim em i poin i go long het bilong namba faiv man. Schneider isave pilim pen, wansait em bilong em i no inap lukluk, na wanpela hap bilong bun bilong het na pes bilong em ol i wok long 'titanium'.

source: Schneider testified via videolink from a USAF base in his homeland.
reference: Schneider i givim wanpela testimoni long wanpela vidio long wanpela USAF senta long kantri bilong em.

source: Beyond Wednesday's event, Carpanedo competed in two individual races at the Championships.
reference: Bihain long resis we i kamap long Trinde, Carpanedo i pilai wanpis insait long tupela narapela resis long dispela Championships.

source: Her first was the Slalom, where she earned a Did Not Finish in her first run. 36 of the 116 competitors had the same result in that race.
reference: Namba wan resis bilong em, em long Slalom, we em i kisim wanpela Did Not Finish insait long namba wan ran bilong em. 36-pela bilong ol 116 lain i kisim wankain risalt (result) insait long dispela resis.

source: Her other race, the Giant Slalom, saw her finish in tenth in the women's sitting group with a combined run time of 4:41.30, 2:11.60 minutes slower than first place finisher Austrian Claudia Loesch and 1:09.02 minutes slower than the ninth place finisher Gyöngyi Dani of Hungary.
reference: Narapela resis bilong em, Giant Slalom, em i pinis namba ten insait long 'women's siiting group' wantaim ran taim bilong 4:41.30, 2:11.60 minit bihain long meri i kam long namba wan ples Austrian Claudia Loesch na 1:09.02 bihain long meri i kam long namba nain ples Gyöngyi Dani bilong Hungary.

source: Four skiers in the women's sitting group failed to finish their runs, and 45 of the 117 total skiers in the Giant Slalom failed to rank in the race.
reference: Ol foapela meri bilong ski insait long 'women's sitting group' i no pinisim ol ran bilong ol, na 45 bilong ol 117 lain i ski long Giant Slalom i no kisim wanpela 'rank' insait long dispela resis.

source: The Madhya Pradesh Police recovered the stolen laptop and mobile phone.
reference: Madhya Pradesh Police i painim dispela leptop na mobail fon we ol i bin stilim.

source: Deputy Inspector General D K Arya said, "We have arrested five persons who raped the Swiss woman and recovered her mobile and laptop".
reference: Deputy Inspector General D K Arya i tok, "Mipela i bin arestim faivpela lain husat i bin reipim (rape) dispela meri bilong Switzerland na kisim mobail fon na ;eptop bilong em".

source: The accused are named as Baba Kanjar, Bhutha Kanjar, Rampro Kanjar, Gaza Kanjar and Vishnu Kanjar.
reference: Nem bilong ol lain we i mekim dispela hevi em Baba Kanjar, Bhutha Kanjar, Rampro Kanjar, Gaza Kanjar na Vishnu Kanjar.

source: Police superintendent Chandra Shekhar Solanki said the accused appeared in court with covered faces.
reference: Police superintendent Chandra Shekhar Solanki i tok olsem ol dispela man i karamapim pes bilong ol taim ol i kamap long kot.

source: Although three people were inside the house when the car impacted it, none of them were hurt.
reference: Maski tripela lain i bin stap insait long haus taim dispela kar i bamim, no gat wanpela bilong ol i kisim bagarap.

source: However, the driver sustained serious injuries to the head.
reference: Tasol, draiva bilong kar i kisim ol bikpela bagarap long het.

source: The road where the crash happened was temporarily closed while emergency services freed the driver from the red Audi TT.
reference: Rot we dispela 'crash' i kamap long en em ol i pasim long sotpela taim na ol imejensi (emergency) sevis i rausim dispela draiva i kam autsait long dispela retpela Audi TT.

source: He was initially hospitalised in the James Paget Hospital in Great Yarmouth.
reference: Pastaim em i bin stap long James Paget Hospital long Great Yarmouth.

source: He was subsequently relocated to Addenbrooke's Hospital in Cambridge.
reference: Na bihain ol i salim em i go long Addenbrooke's Hospital long Cambridge.

source: Adekoya has since been in Edinburgh Sheriff Court charged with murdering her son.
reference: Adekoya i bin stap long Edinburgh Sheriff Court na ol i sasim wm long kilim pikinini man bilong em.

source: She is in custody pending indictment and trial, but any eyewitness evidence may be tainted because her image has been widely published.
reference: Em i stap long kastodi (custody) na i wetim 'indictment' na kot, tasol wanpela evidens bilong 'eyewitness' em i no inap long senisim wanpela samting bikos stori bilong em ol nius i pablisim pinis.

source: This is common practice elsewhere in the UK but Scottish justice works differently and courts have viewed publication of photos as potentially prejudicial.
reference: Dispela em i save kamap long olgeta hap bilong UK, tasol Scottish justicw i save wok narakain na ol kot i bin lukim pablikesen bilong ol foto olsem samting we i soim tingting bilong sampela lain na em i no tru.

source: Professor Pamela Ferguson of the University of Dundee notes "journalists do seem to be walking a dangerous line if publishing photos etc of suspects."
reference: Professor Pamela Ferguson bilong University of Dundee i tok olsem "ol jenelis (journalist) i ken putim ol yet long birua sapos ol i pablisim ol foto na kain samting olsem bilong ol saspek."

source: Crown Office, which is in overall charge of prosecutions, has indicated to journalists that no further comment will be made at least until indictment.
reference: Crown Office, we i bosim olgeta 'prosecution', i bin tokim ol jenelis (journalist) olsem no gat narapela toktok bai kamap i go inap long 'indictment'.

source: The document, according to the leak, will refer to the borders dispute, which Palestine wants based on the borders before the 1967 Mideast War.
reference: Infomesen we ol i mekim i go pablik, i bin toktok long ol kros i kamap long ol boda, we Palestine i bin laikim ol boda we i bin stap bipo long 1967 Mideast War.

source: Other topics covered reportedly include the future state of Jerusalem which is sacred to both nations and the Jordan Valley issue.
reference: Ol narapela topik we dispela ripot i toktok long en, em mak bilong Jerusalem we i stap olsem ples holi long tupela kantri wantaim na hevi bilong Jordan Valley.

source: Israel demands an ongoing military presence in the valley for ten years once an agreement is signed while the PA agrees to leave such presence only for five years.
reference: Israel i laikim olsem i mas i gat ol militeri (military) i stap long veli long tenpela yia taim ol i sainim dispela agrimen na PA i wanbel long lusim dispela kain pasin bilong yusim militeri long faivpela yia tasol.

source: Shooters in the supplementary pest control trial were to be closely supervised by rangers, as the trial was monitored and its effectiveness evaluated.
reference: Ol 'shooter' insait long dispela 'supplementary pest control' test em ol 'ranger' i was long ol, bikos dispela test em ol i monitarim (monitor) na skelim 'effectiveness' bilong em.

source: In a partnership of NPWS and the Sporting Shooters Association of Australia (NSW) Inc, qualified volunteers were recruited, under the Sporting Shooters Association's hunting program.
reference: Insait long wanpela wok patnasip (partnership) bilong NPWS and the Sporting Shooters Association of Australia (NSW) Inc, ol volentia we i kwalifai (qualify) em ol i rikrutim (recruit) ol aninit long 'hunting progrem' bilong Sporting Shooters Association.

source: According to Mick O'Flynn, the Acting Director Park Conservation and Heritage with the NPWS, the four shooters selected for the first shooting operation received comprehensive safety and training instruction.
reference: Acting Director Park Conservation and Heritage, Mick O'Flynn wantaim NPWS i tok olsem, dispela foapela 'shooter' em ol i makim ol long mekim namba wan 'shooting operation' em ol i bin kisim gutpela 'tok stia long sait bilong sefti na long sait bilong treining.

source: Martelly swore in a new Provisional Electoral Council (CEP) of nine members yesterday.
reference: Martelly mekim 'swearing in' bilong nainpela memba bilong wanpela nupela Provisional Electoral Council (CEP) long aste.

source: It is Martelly's fifth CEP in four years.
reference: Dispela em i namba faiv CEP bilong Martelly insait long foapela yia.

source: Last month a presidential commission recommended the prior CEP's resignation as part of a package of measures to move the country towards new elections.
reference: Long mun i go pinis, wanpela komisen (commission) bilong presiden i mekim rekomendesen (recommendation) olsem CEP bilong bipo i mas risain (resign) olsem wanpela hap wok bilong kantri i muv i go long ol nupela ileksen.

source: The commission was Martelly's response to widespread anti-regime protests that started in October.
reference: Dispela komisen (commission) em i wanpela samting we Martelly i mekim bikos long ol 'anit-regime' protes we i wok long kamap long olgeta hap na i stat long Oktoba.

source: The sometimes-violent protests were triggered by failure to hold elections, some due since 2011.
reference: Dispela ol protes em sampela taim i save kamapim kros na pait na ol i wok long kamap bikos i no gat ileksen i kamap, sampela i sapos long kamap long 2011.

source: Around 60 cases of malfunctioning iPods overheating have been reported, causing a total of six fires and leaving four people with minor burns.
reference: Kain olsem 60-pela ripot bilong ol iPods we i no wok gut biko ol i hot tumas i bin kamap, dispela i kamap sikspela paia olgeta na mekim paia i kukim foapela lain na ol i gat 'minor burns'.

source: Japan's Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI) said that it had been aware of 27 accidents related to the devices.
reference: Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI) bilong Japan i tok olsem em i bin save long 27-pela eksiden we i kamap bikos long dispela divais (device).

source: Last week, METI announced that Apple had informed it of 34 additional overheating incidents, which the company called "non-serious."
reference: Long wik i go pinis, METI i tokaut olsem Apple i bin tokim em long 34-pela moa hevi i kamap long 'overheating', we dispela kamapani i kolim olsem "'i no bikpela samting."

source: The ministry responded by calling Apple's postponement of the report "truly regrettable."
reference: Dispela ministri i autim tingting bilong em taim em i kolim dispela pasin bilong Apple long i no givim ripot hariap olsem "i no gutpela tru."

source: The eathquake struck Mariana at 07:19 a.m. local time (09:19 p.m. GMT Friday).
reference: Dispela guria i kamap long Mariana long 07:19 a.m lokel taim (09:19 p.m GMT long Fraide).

source: The Northern Marianas emergency management office said that there were no damages reported in the nation.
reference: Northern Marianas ofis we i save menejim imejensi i tok olsem i no gat bagarap i kamap insait long kantri.

source: Also the Pacific Tsunami Warning Center said that there was no Tsunami indication.
reference: Na tu, Pacific Tsunami Warning Center i tok olsem i no gat sain i soim olsem Tsunami bai i kamap.

source: A former Filipino policeman has kept Hong Kong tourists hostage by hijacking their bus in Manila, the capital of the Philippines.
reference: Wanpela man Filipino husat i bin wok olsem wanpela polis bipo i holimpasim ol turis bilong Hongkong taim em i kisim bas bilong ol long Manila, dispela bikpela siti bilong Philippines.

source: Rolando Mendoza fired his M16 rifle at the tourists.
reference: Rolando Mendoza i sut long M16 gan bilong em long ol turis.

source: Several hostages have been rescued and least six have been confirmed dead so far.
reference: Ol i kisim bek sampela bilong ol lain we em i holimpasim i stap na sikspela bilong ol dispela lain em ol i dai.

source: Six hostages, including the children and elderly, were released early, as were the Filipino photographers.
reference: Sikspela bilong ol lain we em i holimpasim, i gat ol pikinini na lapun i stap wantaim ol, em i lusim ol i go fri pastaim, wantaim ol Filipino we i save kisim foto long kamera.

source: The photographers later took the place of an aged lady as she needed the lavatory. Mendoza was gunned down.
reference: Ol lain we i save kisim foto long kamera i kisim ples bilong wanpela bikmeri long wanem em i laik go long toilet. Ol i sutim Mendoza long gan na em i dai.

source: Liggins followed in his father’s footsteps and entered a career in medicine.
reference: Liggins i bihainim papa bilong em na i kisim wok long sait bilong marasin.

source: He trained as an obstetrician and began to work at the Auckland's National Women's Hospital in 1959.
reference: Em i kisim treining (training) long kamap olsem wanpela 'obstetrician' na i stat long wok long Auckland's National Women's Hospital long 1959.

source: While he was working at the hospital Liggins began to investigate premature labor during his spare time.
reference: Taim em i wok long haus sik Liggins i stat long mekim investigesen (investigation) long 'premature labour' long taim bilong em yet.

source: His research showed that if a hormone was administered it would speed up the baby's foetal lung maturation.
reference: Risets bilong em i soim olsem sapos ol i givim wanpela 'hormone' dispela i inap long mekim 'foetal lung' bilong bebi i gro hariap.

source: Xinhua reported that government investigators recovered two 'black box' flight recorders on Wednesday.
reference: Xinhua i givim ripot olsem long Trinde ol lain bilong gavman we i wok long mekim investigesen (investigation) i painim tupela 'black box' we i save rekodim ol samting i kamp insait long balus.

source: Fellow wrestlers also paid tribute to Luna.
reference: Ol narapela lain we i save pilai restling (wrestling) i soim sori bilong ol long Luna.

source: Tommy Dreamer said "Luna was the first Queen of Extreme. My first manager. Luna passed away on the night of two moons. Pretty unique just like her. Strong woman."
reference: Tommy Dreamer i tok "Luna em i namba wan Queen of Extreme. Em i namba wan meneja bilong mi. Luna i lusim mipela long nait bilong tupela mun. Dispela em i narakain samting na i wankain olsem pasin bilong em. Strongpela meri."

source: Dustin "Goldust" Runnels commented that "Luna was as freaky as me...maybe even more...love her and will miss her...hopefully she's in a better place."
reference: Dustin "Goldust" Runnels i tok olsem "Luna i save mekim ol kainkain samting olsem mi…ating em i winim mi…laikim em na misim (miss) em…mi bilip olsem em i stap long gutpela ples."

source: Out of 1,400 people polled prior to the 2010 federal election, those who oppose Australia becoming a republic grew by 8 per cent since 2008.
reference: Insait long 1,400 manmeri we i givim tingting bilong ol bipo long 2010 ileksen, ol dispela ol kain husat i go agensim dispela tingting bilong Australia i kamap olsem wanpela 'republic' i go antap long 8 pesen (percent) long namba bilong 2008.

source: Caretaker Prime Minister Julia Gillard claimed during the campaign of the 2010 federal election that she believed Australia should become a republic at the end of Queen Elizabeth II's reign.
reference: Caretaker Prime Minister Julia Gillard i tok olsem long taim bilong kempen (campaign) long 2010 ileksen bilong gavman em i bilip olsem Australia i mas kamap olsem wanpela 'republic' taim Queen Elizabeth II i pinis long bosim kantri bilong ol.

source: 34 per cent of those in the poll share this view, wanting Queen Elizabeth II to be Australia's last monarch.
reference: 34 pesen (percent) bilong ol lain insait long dispela 'poll' i gat dispela tingting, we ol i laik olsem Queen Elizabeth II i mas kamap laspela kwin bilong Australia.

source: At the extremes of the poll, 29 per cent of those surveyed believe Australia should become a republic as soon as possible, while 31 per cent believe Australia should never become a republic.
reference: Long ol 'extreme' bilong dispela 'poll', 29 pesen (percent) bilong ol dispela sevei (survey) i bilip olsem Australia i mas kamap wanpela 'republic' hariap, taim 31 pesen i bilip olsem Australia i mas no ken kamap wanpela 'republic'.

source: The Olympic gold medalist was due to swim in the 100m and 200m freestyle and in three relays at the Commonwealth Games, but due to his complaints his fitness has been in doubt.
reference: Dispela man we i bin winim gol medel (gold medal) i bai swim insait long 100m na 200m 'freestyle' na insait long tripela 'relay' long Commonwealth Games, tasol bikos long ol komplen bilong em long 'fitness' em i ol i no save sapos em bai pilai.

source: He has been unable to take the drugs needed to overcome his pain as they are banned from the Games.
reference: Em i bin i no inap long kisim ol drag (drug) we em i nidim long daunim pen bilong em bikos Games i tambu long ol dispela drag.

source: Curtis Cooper, a mathematician and computer science professor at the University of Central Missouri, has discovered the largest known prime number to date on January 25.
reference: Curtis Cooper, wanpela 'mathematician' na 'computer science professor' long University of Central Missouri, i bin painimaut olsem bikpela 'prime number' tru long Jenueri 25.

source: Several people verified the discovery using different hardware and software by the beginning of February and it was announced on Tuesday.
reference: Sampela lain i bin yusim ol kainkain 'hardware' na 'software' long stat nilong Febueri long sekim sapos dispela em i stret na ol i tokaut long dispela long Tunde.

source: Comets may possibly have been a source of water delivery to the earth along with organic matter that can form proteins and support life.
reference: I luk olsem oll 'comet' i bin kisim wanpela sampela samting we i kamapim wara graun wantaim ol narapela 'organic matter' we i ken kamapim ol 'protein' na sapotim laip.

source: Scientists hope to understand how planets form, especially how the Earth formed, since comets collided with the Earth long ago.
reference: Ol saintis i laik klia gut long hau ol 'planet' i kamap, bikpela moa em ol i laik save long hau Earth i bin kamap, taim ol 'comet' i bin bam wantaim Earth long bipo tru.

source: Cuomo, 53, began his governorship earlier this year and signed a bill last month legalizing same-sex marriage.
reference: Cuomo, husat i gat 53 krismas, i statim wok bilong em olsem gavana long stat bilong dispela yia na i sainim wanpela 'bill' long mun i go pinis we i mekim lo i tok orait long man i maritim man yet na meri i maritim meri yet.

source: He referred to the rumors as "political chatter and silliness".
reference: Em tok long ol tok win olsem "ol maus wara bilong politiks na em i pasin bilong ol lain i no gat gutpela tingting".

source: He is speculated to make a run for president in 2016.
reference: Ol i bin ting olsem em i laik resis gen long kamap olsem presiden long 2016.

source: NextGen is a system the FAA claims would allow aircraft to fly shorter routes and save millions of gallons of fuel each year and cut carbon emissions.
reference: NextGen em i wanpela sistem we FAA i tok olsem em bai larim ol balus long flai long ol sotpela rot na seivim (save) planti milien galen (gallon) bilong 'fuel' long olgeta yia na daunim mak bilong 'carbon' we i save go long 'air'.

source: It uses satellite-based technology as opposed to older ground-radar-based technology to allow air traffic controllers to pinpoint aircraft with greater precision and give pilots more accurate information.
reference: Em i save yusim 'satellite-based technology' na i no ol 'ground-radar-based technology' long larim ol 'air traffic controller' long makim balus gut na givim gutpela infomesen long ool pailet.

source: No extra transport is being put on and overground trains will not stop at Wembley, and car parking and park-and-ride facilities are unavailable at the ground.
reference: No gat narapela trenspot (transport) i stap long graun na ol trein (train) we i save ron antap long graun bai i stop long Wembley, na ples bilong putim kar na mekim 'park-and-ride' bai i no inap op.

source: Fears of lack of transportation raised the possibility that the game would be forced to play behind closed doors without the team's supporters.
reference: Pret bilong no gat trenspot (transport) i mekim na i luk olsem dispela geim (game) em ol bai i pilai insait long wanpela hap we i no gat sapota i ken i go.

source: A study published on Thursday in the journal Science reported on formation of a new bird species on the Ecuadorean Galápagos Islands.
reference: Wanpela stadi we ol i pablisim (publish) long Fonde insait long wanpela jenel (journal) ol i kolim Science i givim infomesen long wanpela nupela 'specie' bilong pisin we i staplong Galapagos Islands bilong Ecuador.

source: Researchers from Princeton University in the United States and Uppsala University in Sweden reported the new species evolved in just two generations, though this process had been believed to take much longer, due to breeding between an endemic Darwin finch, Geospiza fortes, and the immigrant cactus finch, Geospiza conirostris.
reference: Ol lain i mekim risets long Princeton University long United States na Uppsala University long Sweden i mekim ripot long wanpela nupela 'specie' we i kamap insait long tupela generesen (generation), tasol ol i ting long dispela proses (process) i kisim longpela taim moa, em i kamap bikos long 'breeding' i kamap namel long Darwin finch bilong dispela eria, Geospiza fortes, na cactus finch we i kam long narapela eria, Geospiza conirostris.

source: Gold may be worked into all sorts of shapes. It can be rolled into tiny shapes.
reference: Gol em ol i ken mekim i go kama kainkain seip (shape). Na ol i ken rolim em na kamapim ol liklik liklik seip (shape).

source: It can be pulled into thin wire, which can be twisted and plaited. It can be hammered or rolled into sheets.
reference: Ol i ken pulim em na mekim em i kamap wanpela liklik bun waia, we ol i ken tanim tanim na pasim. Ol i ken paitim em long hama o rolim na kamapim ol 'sheets'.

source: It can be made very thin, and stuck onto other metal. It can be made so thin that it was sometimes used to decorate the hand-painted pictures in books called "illuminated manuscripts".
reference: Ol i ken mekim em i kama bun na liklik nogut tru na stikim (stick) em i go long ol narapela metel (metal). Sampela taim ol i ken mekim em i kama bun nogut tru na yusim em long bilasim ol piksa we ol peintim (paint) long han na insait long buk we ol i kolim "illuminated manuscripts".

source: This is called a chemical's pH. You can make an indicator using red cabbage juice.
reference: Dispela em ol kolim pH bilong kemikel (chemical). Yu ken mekim wanpela 'indicator' wantaim retpela jus bilong kabis.

source: The cabbage juice changes color depending on how acidic or basic (alkaline) the chemical is.
reference: Kala bilong jus bilong kabis i save sensim bihainim hamas 'acid' o 'basic' (alkaline) i stap long dispela kemikel.

source: The pH level is indicated by the amount of Hydrogen (the H in pH) ions in the tested chemical.
reference: Mak bilong Hydrogen (dispela H insait long pH) 'ion' insait long kemikel (chemical) we ol i testim bai soim level bilong pH.

source: Hydrogen ions are protons that had their electrons stripped off them (since Hydrogen atoms consist of one proton and one electron).
reference: Ol 'ions' bilong Hydrogen em ol 'proton' we ol i bin rausim ol 'electron' bilong ol (bikos ol Hydrogen 'atom' i gat wanpela 'proton' na wanpela 'electron').

source: Swirl the two dry powders together and then, with clean wet hands, squeeze them into a ball.
reference: Miksim tupela drai pauda wantaim na bihain, wantaim han we i klin na wet, skwisim (squeeze) ol na mekim wanpela bal.

source: The moisture on your hands will react with the outer layers, which will feel funny and form a sort of shell.
reference: Dispela wara i stap long han bilong yu bai i 'react' wantaim ol 'layer' we i stap autsait, we bai i pilim narakain na kamapim wanpela kain sel.

source: The cities of Harappa and Mohenjo-daro had a flush toilet in almost every house, attached to a sophisticated sewage system.
reference: Ol siti bilong Harappa na Mohenjo-daro i gat wanpela toilet we i yusim wara long klostu olgeta haus, naol i join i go long wanpela narapela kain 'sewage system'.

source: Remains of sewage systems have been found in the houses of the Minoan cities of Crete and Santorini in Greece.
reference: Ol samting bilong bipo we i soim ol dispela 'sewage system' em ol i bin painim ol long ol haus bilong ol siti bilong Minoan bilong Crete na Santorini long Greece.

source: There were also toilets in ancient Egypt, Persia and China. In Roman civilization, toilets were sometimes part of public bath houses where men and women were together in mixed company.
reference: I gat ol toilet bilong bipotaim tru long Egypt, Persia na China. Long hap bilong ol Rome, ol toilet em ol i stap olsem hap bilong ol pablik haus bilong waswas we ol man na meri i save bung wantaim.

source: When you call someone who is thousands of miles away, you are using a satellite.
reference: Taim yu ringim sampela lain we i stap tausen 'mile' longwe, yu wok long yusim wanpela 'satellite'.

source: The satellite in space gets the call and then reflects it back down, almost instantly.
reference: Dispela 'satellite' long 'space' i kisim dispela kol (call) na salim em i kam daun bek gen, wantu tru.

source: The satellite was sent into space by a rocket. Scientists use telescopes in space because the Earth’s atmosphere distorts some of our light and view.
reference: Dispela 'satellite' em wanpela 'rocket' i bin salim i go long 'space'. Ol saintis i yusim ol 'telescope' long 'space' bikos 'atmosphere' bilong Earth i save tanim sampela bilong ol lait bilong yumi na hau yumi lukim ol samting.

source: It takes a giant rocket over a 100 feet high to put a satellite or telescope in space.
reference: Ol i save yusim wanpela jaient 'rocket' we longpela bilong em i winim 100 'feet' long putim wanpela 'telescope' long 'space'.

source: The wheel has changed the world in incredible ways. The biggest thing that the wheel has done for us is given us much easier and faster transportation.
reference: Dispela wil (wheel) i senisim graun long kainkain we. Bikpela samting tru we wil i mekim long yumi em i givim yumi isipela 'transportation' we i save muv hariap moa.

source: It has brought us the train, the car, and many other transportation devices.
reference: Em i givim yumi trein (train), kar, ma planti narapela masin bilong 'transportation'.

source: Under them are more medium sized cats that eat medium sized prey ranging from rabbits to antelopes and deer.
reference: Aninit long ol em ol namel sais pusi we i save kaikai ol namel sais abus stat long rebit (rabbit) i go long entelop (antelope) na dia (deer).

source: Finally, there are many small cats (including loose pet cats) that eat the far more numerous small prey like insects, rodents, lizards, and birds.
reference: Las tru, i gat planti liklik pusi (wantaim ol dispela we yumi save lukautim long haus) we i save kaikai ol liklik abus kain olsem ol insek (insect), rat, palai, na pisin.

source: The secret to their success is the concept of the niche, a special job each cat holds that keeps it from competing with others.
reference: Sikret (secret) bilong hau ol i save stap gut em i dispela samting ol i kolim 'niche', wanpela spesol wok wanwan pusi i save mekim na em i no resis wantaim narapela.

source: Lions are the most social cats, living in large groups called prides.
reference: Ol laion em ol pusi we i save laik long stap wantaim ol narapela pusi, na ol i save stap wantaim long ol bikpela grup we ol i kolim ol 'pride'.

source: Prides are made up of one to three related adult males, along with as many as thirty females and cubs.
reference: Ol 'pride' i save i gat wanpela i go long mak bilong tripela man, wantaim kain olsem tetipela meri na pikinini.

source: The females are usually closely related to each other, being a large family of sisters and daughters.
reference: Ol meri em ol i kam long wanpela famili, kain olsem wanpela bikpela famili bilong ol sista na ol pikinini meri bilong ol.

source: Lion prides act much like packs of wolves or dogs, animals surprisingly similar to lions (but not other big cats) in behavior, and also very deadly to their prey.
reference: Ol 'pride' bilong ol laion i save ekt long wankain we olsem ol 'pack' bilong ol wulf o dok, ol dispela animal we i wankain long ol laion (tasol i no ol narapela bikpela pusi) long pasin, na tu ol i save kamapim bikpela birua long ol narapela animal we ol i save kaikai.

source: A well rounded athlete, the tiger can climb (though not well), swim, leap great distances and pull with five times the force of a strong human.
reference: Wanpela gutpela 'athlete', taiga i ken klaim (em i no save klaim gut tumas), swim, kalap long bikpela mak na pulim ol samting wantaim strong we i faivpela taim moa long strong bilong man.

source: The tiger is in the same group (Genus Panthera) as lions, leopards, and jaguars. These four cats are the only ones who can roar.
reference: Taiga em i stap insait long seim (same) grup (Genus Panthera) olsem ol laion, 'leopards', na 'jaguars'. Ol dispela foapela pusi em ol tasol i ken 'roar'.

source: The tiger's roar is not like the full-voiced roar of a lion, but more like a sentence of snarly, shouted words.
reference: 'Roar' bilong taiga em i wankaim olsem 'full-voiced roar' bilong wanpela laion, tasol em i klostu i laik wankain olsem wanpela sentens bilong man i pulim win taim em kros na singaut.

source: Ocelots like to eat small animals. They will catch monkeys, snakes, rodents and birds if they can. Almost all of the animals that the ocelot hunts are far smaller than it is.
reference: Ol 'ocelot' i save laik long kaikai ol liklik animal. Ol i save ketsim ol manki (monkey), snek, rat na ol pisin sapos ol i inap long ketsim. Klostu olgeta animal we ol 'ocelot' i save painim em ol i liklik sais moa long em.

source: Scientists think that ocelots follow and find animals to eat (prey) by smell, sniffing for where they've been on the ground.
reference: Ol saintis i ting olsem ol 'ocelot' i save bihainim na painim ol narapela animal long kaikai (traim long kaikai) taim ol i smelim samting, ol i kisim smel bilong ol long wanem hap ol i bin i stap long em long graun.

source: They can see very well in the dark with night vision, and move very stealthily, too. Ocelots hunt their prey by blending in with their surroundings then pouncing on their prey.
reference: Ol i ken lukluk gut tru long tudak wantaim 'night vision', na tu, ol i save muv isi tru. Ol 'ocelot' i save painim kaikai bilong ol taim ol i hait wantaim ol samting i stap long envairomen na kalap antap long animal we ol i laik ketsim.

source: When a small group of living things (a small population) gets separated from the main population that they came from (like if they move over a mountain range or a river, or if they move to a new island so that they can't easily move back) they will often find themselves in a different environment than they were in before.
reference: Taim wanpela liklik grup bilong ol animal (wanpela liklik namba) i lusim bikpela populesen (population) we ol i kam long en (sapos ol i muv i go antap long wanpela maunten o wanpela liklik wara, o saps ol i muv i go long wanpela nupela ailan na ol i painim hat long i go bek) ol bai lukim olsem ol i stap long wanpela narapela envairomen we i no wankain olsem bipo.

source: This new environment has different resources and different competitors, so the new population will need different features or adaptations to be a strong competitor than what they had needed before.
reference: Displela nupela envairomen i gat ol kainkain risos na ol kainkain kompetisen, olsem na dispela nupela populesen (population) bai nidim ol narapela pasin long kamap strong moa long mak we ol i bin stap long en bipo.

source: The original population hasn't changed at all, they still need the same adaptations as before.
reference: Dispela narapela populesen i no senis, tasol ol i nid long mekim ol wankain senis long envairomen bilong ol olsem bipo.

source: Over time, as the new population begins to adapt to their new environment, they start to look less and less like the other population.
reference: Bihain long sampela taim, dispela nupela populesen i stat long mekim senis na lainim long stap long nupela envairomen bilong ol, ol i stat long luk narakain liklik long narapela populesen.

source: Eventually, after thousands or even millions of years, the two populations will look so different that they can't be called the same species.
reference: I go i go, na bihain long sampela tausen o milien yia, dispela tupela populesen bai luk narakain olgeta bai ol lain i no tok olsem ol i wanpela 'specie'.

source: We call this process speciation, which just means the formation of new species. Speciation is an unavoidable consequence and a very important part of evolution.
reference: Mipela i save kolim dispela proses (process) 'speciation', dispela em i min olsem kamapim nupela 'specie'. 'Speciation' em i wanpela samting we yumi i no inap long abrusim na em i wanpela impoten pat bilong 'evolution'.

source: Plants make oxygen which humans breathe, and they take in carbon-dioxide which humans exhale (that is, breathe out).
reference: Ol plent (plant) i save mekim 'oxygen' we yumi ol manmeri i save pulim win long en, na ol i save kisim 'carbon dioxide' we yumi ol manmeri i save rausim i kam autsait long bodi bilong yumi (dispela em, taim win we yumi i pulim i go insait i kam autsait).

source: Plants make their food from the sun by photosynthesis. They also provide shade.
reference: Ol plent (plant) i save mekim kaikai bilong ol long san taim 'photosynthesis' i kamap. Ol i save givim seid (shade).

source: We make our houses from plants and make clothes from plants. Most foods that we eat are plants. Without plants, animals could not survive.
reference: Yumi save mekim ol haus bilong yumi long ol plent (plant) na yumi save mekim ol klos bilong yumi long ol plent. Planti bilong ol kaikai we yumi save kaikai em ol plent. Sapos no gat plent, ol animal bai i no inap long stap laip.

source: Mosasaurus was the apex predator of its time, so it feared nothing, except other mosasaurs.
reference: Ol mosasaurus i bin i stap olsem nambawan wel animal long dispela taim, no gat narapela animal i inap long kaikaim ol, olsem na ol i no pret long wanpela samting. Ol i save pret long narapela mosasaurus tasol.

source: Its long jaws were studded with more than 70 razor-sharp teeth, along with an extra set in the roof of its mouth, meaning that there was no escape for anything that crossed its path.
reference: Maus bilong em i gat moa long 70-pela tit we i sap olsem resa, wantaim wanpela narapela lain tit we i stap long ruf bilong maus. Dispela em i min olsem wanem samting em i bungim bai i no inap long ranawe.

source: We don't know for sure, but it may have had a forked tongue. Its diet included turtles, large fish, other mosasaurs, and it may even have been a cannibal.
reference: Yumi no inap long save, tasol ating em i gat fok tang. Em i save kaikai trausel, bikpela fis, ol narapela mosasaurus, na ating em i save kaikai ol manmeri tu.

source: It also attacked anything that entered the water; even a giant dinosaur such as T. rex would be no match for it.
reference: Em i save kaikai olgeta samting we i go insait long wara; maski wanpela jaient dainaso kain olsem T. rex bai i no inap long em.

source: While most of their food would be familiar to us, Romans did have their share of strange or unusual feast items, including wild boar, peacock, snails, and a type of rodent called a dormouse
reference: Maski planti bilong ol kaiki bilong ol em mipela i ken save, ol Rom i gat ol kaikai we yumi i no save long en o ol save yusim long taim bilong bikpela bung kaikai, wanpela em wel pik, 'peacock', 'snail', na wanpela kain rat ol i kolim 'dormouse'.

source: Another difference was that while the poor people and the woman ate their food while sitting in chairs, the rich men liked to have banquets together where they would lounge on their sides while they ate their meals.
reference: Wanpela narapela samting we i narakain em i olsem taim ol manmeri we i no gat planti samting i kaikai kaiakia bilong ol taim ol i sindaun long ol sia, ol maniman i save laik long i gat ol bikpela bung kaikai we ol i save slip long sait bilong ol na kaikai.

source: Ancient Roman meals couldn't have included foods that came to Europe from America or from Asia in later centuries.
reference: Ol lain bilong bipo long Rom i no bin i gat kaikai we i kam long America o Asia we nau ol i stap long Europe long sampela handret yia bihain.

source: For instance, they didn't have corn, nor tomatoes, nor potatoes, nor cocoa, and no ancient Roman ever tasted a turkey.
reference: Wanpela eksampel em olsem, ol i no gat kon, o tomato, o potato, o kakau, na no gat wanpela bilong ol lain bilong bipo long Rom i bin teistim wanpela 'turkey'.

source: The Babylonians built each of their gods a primary temple that was considered the home of the god.
reference: Ol lain long Babylon i bildim wanpela namba wan tempel long wanwan god bilong ol we ol i save mekim olsem dispela em i haus bilong dispela god.

source: People would bring sacrifices to the gods and the priests would try to attend to the needs of the gods through ceremonies and festivals.
reference: Ol manmeri bai bringim ol samting bilong mekim ofa i go long ol god na ol pris bai traim long inapim samting we ol god i nidim taim ol i mekim ol seremoni (ceremony) na ol bikpela bung bilong lotu.

source: Each temple had an open temple courtyard and then an inner sanctuary that only the priests could enter.
reference: Wanwan tempel i gat wanpela ples bilong sindaun autsait na i gat ples insait we ol pris tasol i ken i go insait.

source: Sometimes special pyramid shaped towers, called ziggurats, were built to be a part of the temples.
reference: Sampela taim ol spesel taua we seip (shape) bilong ol i olsem ol 'pyramid', na ol i kolim ol 'ziggurats', em ol i save bildim olsem pat bilong ol tempel.

source: The top of the tower was special sanctuary for the god.
reference: Antap long dispela taua em sampela spesol ples bilong dispela god i stap.

source: In the warm climate of the Middle East, the house was not so important.
reference: Long ol ples we i hot long Middle East, haus em i no impoten.

source: Most of the life of the Hebrew family happened in the open air.
reference: Planti samting long laip bilong ol Hebrew famili i save kamap autsait long haus.

source: Women did the cooking in the yard; stores were just open counters looking into the street. Stone was used for building houses.
reference: Ol meri i save kukim kaikai autsait long sait bilong haus; ol stoa em ol tebol we i op na i lukluk i go long rot. Ol i save yusim ol ston long bildim ol haus.

source: There were no large forests in the land of Canaan, so wood was extremely expensive.
reference: I bin no gat ol bikpela bus insait long graun bilong ol Canaan, olsem na plang em i ekspensif (expensive) tumas.

source: Greenland was settled sparsely. In the Norse sagas they say that Erik the Red was exiled from Iceland for murder, and when travelling further west, found Greenland and named it Greenland.
reference: I no gat planti lain i sindaun long Greenland. Long ol tumbuna stori bilong ol Norway, ol i tok olsem Erik the Red em ol i bin rausim em long Iceland bikos em i bin kilim wanpela man, na taim em i travel i go long wes, em i painim Greenland na em i givim dispela nem long en.

source: But regardless of his discovery, Eskimo tribes were already living there at the time.
reference: Tasol maski em i painim dispela ples, i gat ol Eskimo i bin i stap pinis long hap long dispela taim.

source: Though each country was 'Scandinavian', there were many differences between the people, kings, customs and history of Denmark, Sweden, Norway and Iceland.
reference: Maski wanwan kantri em i bin 'Scandinavian', i gat planti samting i narakain namel long ol manmeri, ol king, ol kastom na histori bilong Denmark, Sweden, Norway na Iceland.

source: If you have watched the movie National Treasure, you may think a treasure map was written on the back of the Declaration of Independence.
reference: Sapos yu bin lukim muvi National Treasure, yu bai ting olsem ol i raitim wanpela 'treasure map' long baksait bilong Declaration of Independence pepa.

source: However, that is not true. Although there is something written on the back of the document, it is not a treasure map.
reference: Tasol, dispela em i no tru. Maski i gat samting we ol i raitim long baksait bilong wanpela dokumen, dispela em i no wanpela 'treasure map'.

source: Written on the back of the Declaration of Independence were the words "Original Declaration of Independence dated 4th July 1776". The text appears on the bottom of the document, upside down.
reference: Ol i raitim ol dispela hap tok long baksait bilong Declaration of Independence pepa "Original Declaration of Independence dated 4th July 1776". Dispela hap tok i stap long aninit bilong dispela dokumen, na em i stap 'upside down'.

source: While no one knows for certain who wrote it, it is known that early in its life, the large parchment document (it measures 29¾ inches by 24½ inches) was rolled up for storage.
reference: Taim no gat man i save long husat i raitim ol dispela hap tok, ol i save olsem taim em i nupela yet, dispela bikpela 'parchment' dokumen (sais bilong en, em 29¾ 'inches' na 24½ 'inches') em ol i bin rolim bai em i ken stap long storej (storage).

source: So, it is likely that the notation was added simply as a label.
reference: Olsem na, em i luk olsem dispela hap tok ol i bin raitim bihain bai em i ken i stap olsem wanpela 'label'.

source: The D-Day landings and the following battles had freed the north of France, but the south still wasn't free.
reference: Ol D-Day 'landings' na ol narapela pait i bin mekim hap not bilong France i kamap fri, tasol hap saut i no bin kamap fri yet.

source: It was ruled by the "Vichy" French. These were French people who had made peace with the Germans in 1940 and worked with the invaders instead of fighting them.
reference: Dipela hap em ol "Vichy" French i bin bosim. Ol dispela lain ol French manmeri husat i bin mekim 'peace' wantaim ol German long 1940 na i wok wantaim ol lain i kam long kisim kantri bilong ol na ol i no pait agensim ol.

source: On 15 August 1940, the Allies invaded southern France, the invasion was called "Operation Dragoon".
reference: Long 15 August 1940, ol Allies i holimpasim hap saut bilong France, the pait em ol i bin kolim "Operation Dragoon".

source: In just two weeks the Americans and Free French forces had liberated southern France and were turning towards Germany.
reference: Insait long tupela wik tasol ol soldia bilong America na ol Free French i mekim hap saut bilong France i kamap fri na ol i wok long i go long Germany.

source: A civilization is a singular culture shared by a significant large group of people who live and work co-operatively, a society.
reference: Wanpela 'civilization' em i wanpela kalsa we wanpela bikpela lain manmeri husat i save stap wantaim na wok wantaim i serim, em i wanpela 'society'.

source: The word civilization comes from the Latin civilis, meaning civil, related to the Latin civis, meaning citizen, and civitas, meaning city or city-state, and that also somehow defines the size of the society.
reference: Dispela hap tok 'civilization' em i kam long wanpela tok Latin 'civilis', em i min olsem 'civil', na em i wankain olsem narapela tok Latin 'civis', mining bilong en em 'citizen', na 'civitas', mining bilong en em siti o 'city-state', na dispela tu em i toktok long sais bilong 'society'.

source: City-states are the precursors of nations. A civilizational culture implies the passing on of knowledge across several generations, a lingering cultural footprint and fair dissemination.
reference: Ol 'city-states' em ol samting we i save kamapim wanpela kantri. Insait long wanpela 'civilizational culture' em ol lain i save givim save bilong ol i go long sampela 'generation', wanpela kain 'footprint' bilong kalsa we i save stap na rot bilong givim save long ol narapela.

source: Minor cultures often vanish without leaving relevant historic evidence and fail to be recognized as proper civilizations.
reference: Planti taim ol liklik kalsa i save pinis hariap na i no save lusim evidens (evidence) bilong histori bilong ol na ol savemanmeri i no save lukim ol olsem ol i 'civilization' tru tru.

source: During the Revolutionary War, the thirteen states first formed a weak central government—with the Congress being its only component—under the Articles of Confederation.
reference: Long taim bilong Revolutionary War, pastaim ol tetinpela 'states' i kamapim wanpela 'central government' we i no strong—we Congress em i wanpela komponen (component) tasol—aninit long Articles of Confederation.

source: Congress lacked any power to impose taxes, and, because there was no national executive or judiciary, it relied on state authorities, who were often uncooperative, to enforce all its acts.
reference: Congress i no gat pawa long makim na kisim takis, na, bikos i bin no gat 'national executive' o 'judiciary', em i save yusim ol 'state authorities', husat i no save wok wantaim em long planti taim, long mekim ol manmeri i bihainim ol 'act' bilong em.

source: It also had no authority to override tax laws and tariffs between states.
reference: Na tu, em i no gat atoriti long senisim ol 'tax law' na ol 'tariff' namel long ol 'state'.

source: The Articles required unanimous consent from all the states before they could be amended and states took the central government so lightly that their representatives were often absent.
reference: Ol 'Article' i nidim ol lain long tok orait long olgeta 'state' bipo long ol i ken mekim senis na ol 'state' i kisim 'central government' olsem na ol lain we ol i makim i no save stap.

source: Italy's national football, along with German national football team is the second most successful team in the world and were the FIFA World Cup champions in 2006.
reference: 'National football' bilong Italy, wantaim 'national football' tim bilong Germany em tupela namba tu tim we i gutpela tru insait long olgeta hap bilong graun na ol i bin sempion bilong FIFA World Cup long 2006.

source: Popular sports include football, basketball, volleyball, water-polo, fencing, rugby, cycling, ice hockey, roller hockey and F1 motor racing.
reference: Ol 'sport' we planti manmeri i save long en em 'football', 'basketball', 'volleyball', 'water-polo', 'fencing', 'rugby', 'cycling', 'ice hockey', 'roller hockey' na 'F1 motor racing'.

source: Winter sports are most popular in the Northern regions, with Italians competing in international games and Olympic events.
reference: Ol 'winter sport' em planti lain long ol 'Northern regions' i save long en, na ol lain long Italy i save pilai insait long ol intanesinel geim (game) na ol Olympic events.

source: Japans holds nearly 7,000 islands (the biggest being Honshu), making Japan the 7th largest island in the world!
reference: Japan i gat 7,000 ailan (bikpela ailan tru em i Honshu), na dispela i mekim Japan i kamalpl olsem namba 7 bikpela ailan insait long olgeta hap bilong graun.

source: Due to the cluster/group of islands Japan has, Japan is often referred to, on a geographical stance, as an "archipelago"
reference: Bikos long grup bilong ol ailan we Japan i gat, ol laini save kolim Japan olsem, long sait bilong 'geography', em i wanpela "'archipelago'"

source: Taiwan beginning start way back in 15th century where European sailors passing by record the island’s name as Ilha Formosa, or beautiful island.
reference: Stat bilong Taiwan i kamap long '15th century' taim ol 'sailor' bilong Europe i abrusim em na i rekodim nem bilong em olsem Ilha Formosa, o naispela ailan.

source: In 1624,Dutch East India Company establishes a base in southwestern Taiwan, initiating a transformation in aboriginal grain production practices and employing Chinese laborers to work on its rice and sugar plantations.
reference: Long 1624, Dutch East India Company i wokim wanpela senta bilong ol long 'southwestern' Taiwan, dispela i statim wanpela senis we i kamap long pasin bilong wokim 'grain' taim ol i kisim ol wokman bilong China long wok long ol rais na suga plentesen (plantation) bilong em.

source: In 1683, Qing dynasty (1644-1912) forces take control of Taiwan’s western and northern coastal areas and declared Taiwan as a province of the Qing Empire in 1885.
reference: Long 1683, ol soldia bilong Qing dynasty (1644-1912) i holimpasim na kisim 'western' na 'northern' nambis eria bilong Taiwan na tokaut olsem Taiwan em i wanpela provins bilong Qing Empire long 1885.

source: In 1895, after defeat in the First Sino-Japanese War (1894-1895), the Qing government signs the Treaty of Shimonoseki, by which it cedes sovereignty over Taiwan to Japan, which rules the island until 1945.
reference: Long 1895, bihain long em i lusim pait insait long First Sino-Japanese War (1894-1895), Qing gavman i sainim Treaty of Shimonoseki, insait long dispela em i givim pawa bilong Taiwan i go long Japan, husat i bosim dispela ailan i go inap long 1945.

source: Machu Picchu consist of three main structures, namely Intihuatana, the Temple of the Sun, and the Room of the Three Windows.
reference: Machu Picchu i gat tripela bikpela straksa (structure), nem bilong ol em Intihuatana, Temple of the Sun, na Room of the Three Windows.

source: Most of the buildings on the edges of the complex have been rebuilt in order to give tourists a better idea of how they originally appeared.
reference: Planti bilong ol bilding we i stap long arere bilong dispela straka (structure) em ol i bin bildim gen long helpim ol turis long save wanem kain we dispela straksa i bin luk long taim bipo.

source: By 1976, thirty percent of Machu Picchu had been restored and restoration continues till today.
reference: Long 1976, teti pesen (percent) bilong Machu Picchu em ol i bin bildim bek gen na ol i wok long stretim yet i kam inap tude.

source: For example, the most common still image photography format in the world is 35mm, which was the dominant film size at the close of the analog film era.
reference: Eksampel, 'still image photography' fomet (format) we planti lain i save long en em i 35mm, we i nambawan sais bilong 'film' bihain long taim bilong 'analog film'.

source: It is still produced today, but more importantly its aspect ratio has been inherited by digital camera image sensor formats.
reference: Ol i wokim em yet long tude, tasol impoten moa em i olsem 'aspect ratio' bilong en em ol 'digital camera image senor' fomet (format) i kisim na yusim.

source: The 35mm format is actually, somewhat confusingly, 36mm in width by 24mm in height.
reference: Ol 35mm fomet (format) em ol, i ken mekim ol lain i paul, ol i gat 36mm long 'width' na 24mm long 'height'.

source: The aspect ratio of this format (dividing by twelve to obtain the simplest whole-number ratio) is therefore said to be 3:2.
reference: 'Aspect ratio' bilong dispela fomet (format) (ol i divaidim (divide) em wantaim twelv long kisim wanpela liklik 'whole-number ratio') na ol i tok dispela 'ratio' em i 3:2.

source: Many common formats (APS family of formats, for example) are equal to or closely approximate this aspect ratio.
reference: Planti ol fomet (format) we ol lain i save yusim (eksampel, APS famili bilong ol fomet) em i wankain o klostu wankain olsem dispela 'aspect ratio'.

source: The much-abused and often-ridiculed rule of thirds is a simple guideline creating dynamism while keeping a measure of order in an image.
reference: Dispela 'rule of thrids' we planti lain i save bagarapim na tok pilai long en em i wanpela isipela 'guideline' we kamapim gutpela foto na i mekim na i gat sampela oda insait long wanpela piksa.

source: It states that the most effective place for the main subject is at the intersection of lines dividing the image into thirds vertically and horizontally (see example).
reference: Em i tok olsem gutpela ples bilong wanpela sabjek (subject) long i stap long taim bilong kisim foto em long ples we ol lain i brukim piksa i go long tripela hap 'vertically' na 'horizontally' (lukim eksampel).

source: During this period of European history, the Catholic Church, which had become rich and powerful, came under scrutiny.
reference: Long dispela taim, Katolik Sios i bin i gat planti mani na pawa, olsem na ol i skelim em gut tru.

source: For over a thousand years the Christian religion had bound European states together despite differences in language and customs. I
reference: Moa long wan tausen yia, dispela lotu bilong ol Kristen i bin bungim ol kantri bilong Europe wantaim, maski ol i gat wanwan tok ples na kastom bilong ol yet.

source: Its all-pervading power affected everyone from king to commoner.
reference: Dispela bikpela pawa bilong em i kamapim senis long olgeta manmeri. Stat long king na i go daun long ol manmeri nating we i no gat nem na namba.

source: One of the main Christian tenets is that wealth should be used to alleviate suffering and poverty and that the monetary funds of the church are there specifically for that reason.
reference: Wanpela bilong ol bikpela bilip bilong ol Kristen em i olsem ol i mas yusim gut mani na kago bilong ol long helpim ol narapela we i gat pen na hevi o i no gat mani na kaikai. Ol i bilip olsem mani bilong sios em i bilong mekim dispela wok.

source: The central authority of the church had been in Rome for over a thousand years and this concentration of power and money led many to question whether this tenet was being met.
reference: Rom i bin go pas long lukautim wok bilong sios long tausen yia na planti pawa na moni i stap long Rom. Dispela i mekim na planti manmeri i wok long i gat tupela tingting sapos em i inapim dispela bilip, o nogat.

source: Soon after the outbreak of hostilities, Britain initiated a naval blockade of Germany.
reference: Bihain tasol long pait i stat, Britain i mekim wanpela 'naval blockade' long Germany.

source: The strategy proved effective, cutting off vital military and civilian supplies, although this blockade violated generally accepted international law codified by several international agreements of the past two centuries.
reference: Dispela plen bilong ol em i wok gut, ol i stopim impoten saplai (supply) i go long militeri (military) na ol manmeri, maski dispela 'blokade' i brukim intanesinel lo we i bin kamap aninit long ol agrimen bilong tupela 'century' i go pinis.

source: Britain mined international waters to prevent any ships from entering entire sections of ocean, causing danger to even neutral ships.
reference: Britain i putim ol bom aninit long ol intanesinel wara long stopim ol sip long i go insait long bikpela seksen bilong solwara, dispela i kamapim birua tu long ol sip bilong ol narapela lain we i no stap insait long dispela pait.

source: Since there was limited response to this tactic, Germany expected a similar response to its unrestricted submarine warfare.
reference: Bikos i no gat bekim i kamap long dispela 'tactic', Germany i ting olsem wankain samting bai i kamap long ol 'submarine' bilong em.

source: During the 1920s, the prevailing attitudes of most citizens and nations was that of pacifism and isolation.
reference: Long ol yia bilong 1920, pasin bilong bikpela namba bilong ol sitisen (citizen) na ol kantri em long kisim bel isi na wanbel na stap ol yet.

source: After seeing the horrors and atrocities of war during World War I, nations desired to avoid such a situation again in the future.
reference: Ol kantri i lukim pinis ol pen na hevi na kranki pasin bilong woa we i kamap insait long World War I, ol kantri i laik long abrusim dispela kain samting long kamap gen long bihaintaim.

source: In 1884, Tesla moved to the United States of America to accept a job with the Edison Company in New York City.
reference: Long 1884, Telsa i muv i go long United States of America long wok wantaim Edison Company long New York City.

source: He arrived in the US with 4 cents to his name, a book of poetry, and a letter of recommendation from Charles Batchelor (his manager in his previous job) to Thomas Edison.
reference: Em i kamap long US wantaim 4 cents, wanpela 'poetry' buk, na wanpela leta bilong rekomendesen i kam long Charles Batchelor (meneja bilong em long wok em i bin mekim bipo) i go long Thomas Edison.

source: Ancient China had a unique way of showing different time periods; each stage of China or each family that was in power was a distinctive dynasty.
reference: Ancient China i gat wanpela narakain we bilong soim ol kainkain time; wanwan 'stage' bilong China o wanwan famili we i holim pawa em i wanpela 'dynasty'.

source: Also between each dynasty was an unstable age of divided provinces. The best-known of these periods was the Three Kingdoms epoch taking place for 60 years between the Han and the Jin Dynasty.
reference: Na tu, namel long wanwan 'dynasty' i gat taim we ol provins i stap ol yet. Wanpela bilong ol dispela taim we planti lain i save long en em taim bilong Three Kingdom we i stap long 60-pela yia namel long Han na Jin Dynasty.

source: During these periods fierce warfare took place between many nobles fighting for the throne.
reference: Long ol dispela ol taim bikpela pait i kamap namel long ol planti bilong ol famili we i gat nem na namba i pait long sia king.

source: The Three Kingdoms was one of the bloodiest eras in Ancient China’s history thousands of people died fighting to sit in the highest seat in the grand palace at Xi’an.
reference: Three Kingdoms em i wanpela bilong ol taim bilong pait insait long histori bilong Ancient China we planti tausen manmeri i dai taim ol pait long sindaun long nambawan sia insait long 'grand palace' long Xi’an.

source: There are a lot of social and political effects such as the use of metric system, a shift from absolutism to republicanism, nationalism and the belief the country belongs to the people not to one sole ruler.
reference: I gat planti ol samting i kamap long 'society' na 'politics' kain olsem pasin bilong yusim 'metric system'. na senis long 'absolutism' i go long 'republicanism', na pasin bilong 'nationalism' na bilip long kantri em i samting bilong ol manmeri na i no bilong wanpela man tasol we i bosim ol.

source: Also after the Revolution occupations were open to all male applicants allowing the most ambitious and successful to succeed.
reference: Na tu, bihain long Revolution ol wok i op long olgeta man long larim ol man i gat driman na i save wok hat long mekim ol gutpela wok we ol i laik long mekim.

source: Same goes for the military because instead of army rankings being based on class they were now based on cailaber.
reference: Dispela em i wankain long ol militeri (military) bikos nau ol i no kisim 'rank' we i bihainim 'class' bilong famili bilong ol, tasol ol bai i kisim 'rank' we i bihainim pasin bilong ol na wanem samting ol i inap long mekim.

source: The French Revolution also inspired many other repressed working class people of other country's to began their own revolutions.
reference: French Revolution i kirapim tingting bilong planti ol narapela 'working class' manmeri long ol narapela kantri long statim ol 'revolution' bilong ol yet.

source: Muhammad was deeply interested in matters beyond this mundane life. He used to frequent a cave that became known as “Hira‘” on the Mountain of “Noor” (light) for contemplation.
reference: Muhammad i gat intres long ol samting we i bikpela moa long ol samting bilong dispela laip. Em i save go long wanpela hul bilong ston we ol i kolim olsem “Hira'” long Mountain of “Noor” (lait) long i stap na tingting.

source: he cave itself, which survived the times, gives a very vivid image of Muhammad’s spiritual inclinations.
reference: Dispela hul bilong ston, we i stap yet, i save givim klia piksa long ol bilip bilong Muhammad.

source: Resting on the top of one of the mountains north of Mecca, the cave is completely isolated from the rest of the world.
reference: Em i stap antap long wanpela bilong ol maunten long hap not bilong Mecca, dispela hul bilong ston em i stap hait long olgeta hap bilong graun.

source: In fact, it is not easy to find at all even if one knew it existed. Once inside the cave, it is a total isolation.
reference: Tru tru, em i no isi long painim em o save sapos em i stap. Taim yu stap insait long dispela hul bilong ston, em yu stap longwe olgeta long ol narapela samting.

source: Nothing can be seen other than the clear, beautiful sky above and the many surrounding mountains. Very little of this world can be seen or heard from inside the cave.
reference: Yu no inap long lukim wanpela narapela samting tasol skai we i klia, i luk nais na i stap antap na planti maunten i raunim em. Yu no inap long lukim o harim ol samting bilong dispela graun taim yu stap insait long dispela hul bilong ston.

source: The Great Pyramid at Giza is the only one of the seven wonders that is still standing today.
reference: 'Great Pyramid' long Giza em i wanpela bilong ol 'seven wonders' we i sanap yet long tude.

source: Built by the Egyptians in the third century BCE, the Great Pyramid is one of many large pyramid structures built to honor dead Pharaoh.
reference: Ol lain Egypt i bildim long 'third century' BCE, Great Pyramid em i wanpela bilong ol bikpela pyramid straksa we ol i wokim long givim ona long wanpela Pharaoh we i dai pinis.

source: The Giza Plateau, or "Giza Necropolis" in the Egyptian Valley of the Dead contains several pyramids (of which the great pyramid is the largest), several small tombs, several temples, and the great Sphinx.
reference: Giza Plateau, o "Giza Necropolis" insait long Valley of the Dead bilong Egypt i gat sampela pyramid (bikpela tru long olgeta em 'great pyramid'), sampela liklik 'tomb', sampela tempel, na 'great Sphinx'.

source: The great pyramid was created to honor the Pharaoh Khufu, and many of the smaller pyramids, tombs, and temples were built to honor Khufu's wives and family members.
reference: 'Great pyramid' em ol i bin wokim long givim ona long Pharaoh Khufu, na planti ol liklik pyramid, ol 'tomb', na tempel em ol i wok long givim ona long ol meri na famili memba bilong Khufu.

source: The "up bow" mark looks like a V and the "down bow mark" like a staple or a square missing its bottom side.
reference: Dispela "'up bow" mark' i luk olsem wanpela V na dispela "'down bow mark'" i luk olsem wanpela 'staple' o wanpela 'square' i no gat aninit sait bilong em.

source: Up means you should start at the tip and push the bow, and down means you should start at the frog (which is where your hand is holding the bow) and pull the bow.
reference: 'Up' em i min olsem yu mas stat long 'tip' na pusim 'bow', na 'down' em i min olsem yu mas stat long 'frog' (dispela em i ples we han bilong yu i holim 'bow') na pulim dispela 'bow'.

source: An up-bow usually generates a softer sound, while a down-bow is stronger and more assertive.
reference: Wanpela 'up-bow' em i save kamapim wanpela saun we i 'soft' moa, na wanpela 'down-bow' em i wanpela saun we i strong moa na i gat moa fos.

source: Feel free to pencil in your own marks, but remember the printed bowing marks are there for a musical reason, so they should usually be respected.
reference: Yu kem mekim ol mak bilong yu yet wantaim pensil, tasol tingim ol 'bowing marks' we ol i printim pinis em i gat as na ol i stap, olsem na yu mas rispektim ol.

source: The terrified King Louis XVI, Queen Marie Antoinette their two young children (11 year old Marie Therese and four year old Louis-Charles) and the King's sister, Madam Elizabeth, on the 6th October 1789 were forced back to Paris from Versailles by a mob of market women.
reference: Long namba 6 de bilong Oktoba 1789 ol maket meri i mekim King Louis XVI, Queen Marie Antoinette na tupela liklik pikinini bilong ol (Marie Therese we i gat 11-pela krismas na Louis-Charles we i gat 4-pela krismas) na susa bilong King, Madam Elizabeth, i go bek long Paris taim ol i stap long Versailles.

source: In a carriage, they traveled back to Paris surrounded by a mob of people screaming and shouting threats against the King and Queen.
reference: Insait long wanpela karis, ol i ron i go bek long Paris taim ol bikpela lain manmeri i belhat na i raunim ol na i wok long singaut na mekim ol kainkain toktok bilong pretim King na Queen.

source: The mob of people forced the King And Queen to have their carriage windows wide open.
reference: Ol dipela bikpela lain manmeri we i belhat na i stap i fosim King na Queen long larim ol windua bilong karis bilong ol i op na i stap.

source: At one point a member of the mob waved the head of a royal guard killed at Versailles in front of the terrified Queen.
reference: Wanpela taim wanpela man insait long ol bikpela lain manmeri i apim na soim het bilong wanpela 'royal guard' we ol i bin kilim long Versailles long fran bilong Queen na em i pret nogut tru.

source: The war expenditures of U.S. imperialism in the conquest of the Philippines were paid for by the Filipino people themselves.
reference: Mani bilong woa we U.S i kamapim taim em i laik holimpasim na kisim Philippines em ol manmeri long Filipino yet i baim.

source: They were compelled to pay taxes to the U.S. colonial regime to defray a major part of the expenditures and the interest on bonds floated in the name of the Philippine government through the Wall Street banking houses.
reference: Ol i fosim ol long baim takis i go long 'colonial regime' bilong U.S long givim mani i go long ol 'expenditure' na 'interest' long ol 'bond' we ol yusim aninit long nem bilong gavman bilong Philipines insait long ol benk (bank) bilong Wall Street.

source: Of course, the superprofits derived from the protracted exploitation of the Filipino people would constitute the basic gains of U.S. imperialism.
reference: Em i tru olsem, ol bikpela win mani we i kamap taim o i bagarapim ol Filipino manmeri em bai kamapim ol win mani bilong U.S long bosim ol narapela hap bilong graun.

source: To understand the Templars one must understand the context that prompted the creation of the order.
reference: Long klia gut long ol Templars yumi mas klia gut long stori i stap baksait we i mekim ol i kamapim dispela grup.

source: The age where the events took place is commonly referred as the High Middle Ages the period of European history in the 11th, 12th, and 13th centuries (AD 1000–1300).
reference: Dispela taim we ol samting i kamap em ol i save kolim olsem High Middle Ages dispela taim insait long histori bilong Europe long 11th, 12th na '13th century' (AD 1000–1300).

source: The High Middle Ages were preceded by the Early Middle Ages and followed by the Late Middle Ages, which by convention ends around 1500.
reference: Bipo long High Middle Ages i bin gat Early Middle Ages na bihain long en i bin gat Late Middle Ages, dispela taim em i pinis long kain taim olsem 1500.

source: Technological determinism is a term that encompasses a wide range of ideas in practice, from technology-push or the technological imperative to a strict sense that human destiny is driven by an underlying logic associated with scientific laws and their manifestation in technology.
reference: 'Technological determinism' em i wanpela hap tok we i gat planti kainkain tingting we ol manmeri i save prektisim, stat long 'technology push' o 'technological imperative' i go long wanpela tingting we i tok olsem pasin bilong ol manmeri bilong graun em long bihainim ol lo bilong sains na kamapim ol teknoloji we i save bihainim ol dispela lo bilong sains.

source: Most interpretations of technological determinism share two general ideas: that the development of technology itself follows a path largely beyond cultural or political influence, and that technology in turn has "effects" on societies that are inherent, rather than socially conditioned.
reference: Planti bilong ol tingting long mining bilong 'technological determinism' i gat tupela bikpela tingting insait long ol: wanpela em i olsem divelopmen bilong teknoloji i bihainim wanpela rot we kalsa na politiks i no inap long senisim, na narapela em i olsem teknoloji i kamapim "senis" long ol komuniti bikos dispela ol pasin na tingting em ol manmeri i bon wantaim na teknoloji i no kamapim.

source: For example, one might say that the motor car necessarily leads to the development of roads.
reference: Eksampel em, yumi i ken tok olsem kar i mekim na ol manmeri i kamapim ol rot.

source: However, a nationwide road network is not economically viable for just a handful of cars, so new methods of production are developed to reduce the cost of car ownership.
reference: Tasol, wanpela rot we i go long olgeta hap bilong kantri em bai i westim mani bikos i gat sampela kar tasol, olsem na ol nupela rot bilong wokim kar i kamap bilong daunim prais bilong kar.

source: Mass car ownership also leads to a higher incidence of accidents on the roads, which leads to the invention of new techniques in healthcare for repairing damaged bodies.
reference: Taim planti manmeri i gat kar, planti eksiden i ken kamap long ol rot, dispela bai i mekim na ol lain bai i kamapim ol nupela teknik insait long heltkea long stretim ol bagarap long bodi.

source: Romanticism had a large element of cultural determinism, drawn from writers such as Goethe, Fichte, and Schlegel.
reference: Romanticicm i bin gat wanpela bikpela hap tingting bilong 'cultural determinism' insait long em, dispela tingting em i kam long 'writer' olsem Goethe, Fichte, na Schlegel.

source: In the context of Romanticism, the geography molded individuals, and over time customs and culture related to that geography arose, and these, being in harmony with the place of the society, were better than arbitrarily imposed laws.
reference: Long sait bilong Romanticisim, ples we ol man i kam long en i save mekim ol i gat wanpela kain pasin, na bihain long sampela taim ol kastom na ol kalsa we i go wantaim ples we ol i stap long en i save kamap, na ol dispela, bai soim wanem pasin em i pasin bilong ol manmeri long dispela ples, dispela em i gutpela moa long ol lo we ol lain i kisim nating long narapela hap na i kam yusim.

source: In the manner that Paris is known as the fashion capital of the contemporary world, Constantinople was regarded as the fashion capital of feudal Europe.
reference: Long dispela rot, Paris i kamap olsem nambawan ples bilong ol kainkain stail bilong klos long dispela graun long tude, tasol Constantinople em i stap olsem nambawan siti bilong kainkain stail klos long taim bilong 'middle ages' long Europe.

source: Its renown for being an epicenter of luxury began in about 400 A.D. and lasted up until about 1100 A.D.
reference: Planti lain manmeri i save long em bikos em i asples bilong gutpela laipstail na em i bin stat long 400 A.D na pinis long kain taim olsem 1100 A.D.

source: Its status declined during the twelfth century mainly due to the fact that Crusaders had returned bearing gifts such as silks and spices that were valued more than what Byzantine markets offered.
reference: Long 'twelfth century', velu (value) bilong em i go daun bikos ol Crusaders i bin kam bek na ol i karim ol presen kain olsem ol silk na spais. Velu bilong ol dispela samting i antap moa long velu bilong ol samting we i stap long ol maket bilong ol Byzantine.

source: It was at this time that the transfer of the title of Fashion Capital from Constantinople to Paris was made.
